  1053	    def _get_ui_attacher(self):
  1054	        """Get UIAttacher instance (lazy initialization)."""
  1055	        if not hasattr(self, '_ui_attacher'):
  1056	            from .ui_attach import UIAttacher
  1057	            
  1058	            # Get ui_roots from synapse config if available
  1059	            ui_roots = {}
  1060	            if hasattr(self, '_synapse_config') and self._synapse_config:
  1061	                cfg = self._synapse_config
  1062	                ui_roots = {
  1063	                    "comfyui": cfg.store.ui_roots.comfyui,
  1064	                    "forge": cfg.store.ui_roots.forge,
  1065	                    "a1111": cfg.store.ui_roots.a1111,
  1066	                    "sdnext": cfg.store.ui_roots.sdnext,
  1067	                }
  1068	            else:
  1069	                # Fallback to defaults
  1070	                from pathlib import Path
  1071	                home = Path.home()
  1072	                ui_roots = {
  1073	                    "comfyui": home / "ComfyUI",
  1074	                    "forge": home / "stable-diffusion-webui-forge",
  1075	                    "a1111": home / "stable-diffusion-webui",
  1076	                    "sdnext": home / "sdnext",
  1077	                }
  1078	            
  1079	            # Get store config for UIKindMap
  1080	            try:
  1081	                store_config = self.layout.load_config()
  1082	            except Exception:
  1083	                store_config = None
  1084	            
  1085	            self._ui_attacher = UIAttacher(self.layout, ui_roots, store_config)
  1086	        
  1087	        return self._ui_attacher

  1089	    def attach_uis(
  1090	        self,
  1091	        ui_targets: Optional[List[str]] = None,
  1092	        ui_set: Optional[str] = None,
  1093	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  1094	        """
  1095	        Attach UIs to their Synapse views.
  1096	        
  1097	        Creates symlinks so UIs can see Synapse-managed models.
  1098	        
  1099	        Args:
  1100	            ui_targets: List of UI names. If None, uses ui_set.
  1101	            ui_set: Name of UI set to use. Uses default if None.
  1102	        
  1103	        Returns:
  1104	            Dict mapping ui -> result dict
  1105	        """
  1106	        if ui_targets is None:
  1107	            ui_targets = self.get_ui_targets(ui_set)
  1108	        
  1109	        attacher = self._get_ui_attacher()
  1110	        results = attacher.attach_all(ui_targets)
  1111	        
  1112	        # Convert to dict for serialization
  1113	        return {
  1114	            ui: {
  1115	                "ui": r.ui,
  1116	                "success": r.success,
  1117	                "method": r.method,
  1118	                "created": r.created,
  1119	                "errors": r.errors,
  1120	            }
  1121	            for ui, r in results.items()
  1122	        }
  1123	    
  1124	    def detach_uis(
  1125	        self,
  1126	        ui_targets: Optional[List[str]] = None,
  1127	        ui_set: Optional[str] = None,
  1128	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  1129	        """
  1130	        Detach UIs from Synapse views.
  1131	        
  1132	        Removes symlinks.
  1133	        
  1134	        Args:
  1135	            ui_targets: List of UI names. If None, uses ui_set.
  1136	            ui_set: Name of UI set to use. Uses default if None.
  1137	        
  1138	        Returns:
  1139	            Dict mapping ui -> result dict
  1140	        """
  1141	        if ui_targets is None:
  1142	            ui_targets = self.get_ui_targets(ui_set)
  1143	        
  1144	        attacher = self._get_ui_attacher()
  1145	        results = {}
  1146	        for ui in ui_targets:
  1147	            r = attacher.detach(ui)
  1148	            results[ui] = {
  1149	                "ui": r.ui,
  1150	                "success": r.success,
  1151	                "method": r.method,
  1152	                "created": r.created,
  1153	                "errors": r.errors,
  1154	            }
  1155	        
  1156	        return results
  1157	    
  1158	    def refresh_attached_uis(
  1159	        self,
  1160	        ui_targets: Optional[List[str]] = None,
  1161	        ui_set: Optional[str] = None,
  1162	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  1163	        """
  1164	        Refresh attachment for UIs that are already attached.
  1165	        
  1166	        This updates paths to match current active view WITHOUT attaching
  1167	        UIs that are currently detached.

  1169	        Called automatically after use/back/sync to keep attached UIs in sync.
  1170	        
  1171	        Args:
  1172	            ui_targets: List of UI names. If None, uses ui_set.

  1175	        Returns:
  1176	            Dict mapping ui -> result dict (only for UIs that were refreshed)
  1177	        """
  1178	        if ui_targets is None:
  1179	            ui_targets = self.get_ui_targets(ui_set)
  1180	        
  1181	        attacher = self._get_ui_attacher()
  1182	        results = attacher.refresh_attached(ui_targets)
  1183	        
  1184	        # Convert to dict for serialization
  1185	        return {
  1186	            ui: {
  1187	                "ui": r.ui,
  1188	                "success": r.success,
  1189	                "method": r.method,
  1190	                "created": r.created,
  1191	                "errors": r.errors,
  1192	            }
  1193	            for ui, r in results.items()
  1194	        }

  1196	    def get_attach_status(
  1197	        self,

  1210	        """
  1211	        if ui_targets is None:
  1212	            ui_targets = self.get_ui_targets(ui_set)
  1213	        
  1214	        attacher = self._get_ui_attacher()
  1215	        return {ui: attacher.status(ui) for ui in ui_targets}

  1355	    def get_backup_status(self) -> "BackupStatus":
  1356	        """

  1360	            BackupStatus with connection info and statistics

  1368	    def backup_blob(

  1385	    def restore_blob(

  1422	        only_missing: bool = True,
  1423	        dry_run: bool = True,
  1424	    ) -> "SyncResult":
  1425	        """
  1426	        Sync blobs between local and backup storage.
  1427	
  1428	        Args:
  1429	            direction: "to_backup" or "from_backup"
  1430	            only_missing: Only sync blobs missing from target
  1431	            dry_run: If True, only preview without syncing
  1432	
  1433	        Returns:
  1434	            SyncResult with sync details
  1435	        """
  1436	        return self.backup_service.sync(
  1437	            direction=direction,
  1438	            only_missing=only_missing,
  1439	            dry_run=dry_run,
  1440	        )
  1441	
  1442	    def configure_backup(self, config: "BackupConfig") -> None:
  1443	        """
  1444	        Update backup configuration.
  1445	
  1446	        Args:
  1447	            config: New backup configuration
  1448	        """
  1449	        # Update the stored config
  1450	        if self.is_initialized():
  1451	            store_config = self.layout.load_config()
  1452	            store_config.backup = config
  1453	            self.layout.save_config(store_config)
  1454	        # Update the service
  1455	        self.backup_service.update_config(config)
  1456	
  1457	    def is_backup_connected(self) -> bool:
  1458	        """Quick check if backup is connected."""
  1459	        return self.backup_service.is_connected()
  1460	
  1461	    def blob_exists_on_backup(self, sha256: str) -> bool:
  1462	        """Check if blob exists on backup storage."""
  1463	        return self.backup_service.blob_exists_on_backup(sha256)
  1464	
  1465	    # =========================================================================

 succeeded in 0ms:
   538	    def refresh_attached(self, ui_targets: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> Dict[str, AttachResult]:
   539	        """
   540	        Refresh attachment for UIs that are already attached.
   541	        
   542	        This is called after use/back/sync to update paths to match new active view.
   543	        Only updates UIs that are currently attached - does NOT attach detached UIs.
   544	        
   545	        Args:
   546	            ui_targets: List of UIs to check. If None, checks all configured.
   547	        
   548	        Returns:
   549	            Dict mapping ui_name -> AttachResult (only for UIs that were refreshed)
   550	        """
   551	        if ui_targets is None:
   552	            ui_targets = list(self.ui_roots.keys())
   553	        
   554	        results = {}
   555	        
   556	        for ui_name in ui_targets:
   557	            ui_name = ui_name.lower()
   558	            current_status = self.status(ui_name)
   559	            
   560	            # Only refresh if already attached
   561	            if not current_status.get("attached"):
   562	                logger.debug(f"[{ui_name}] Not attached, skipping refresh")
   563	                continue
   564	            
   565	            # Re-attach to update paths
   566	            if ui_name == "comfyui":
   567	                results[ui_name] = self.attach_comfyui_yaml()
   568	            else:
   569	                results[ui_name] = self.attach(ui_name)
   570	            
   571	            logger.info(f"[{ui_name}] Refreshed attachment for active view")
   572	        
   573	        return results
   574	    
   575	    def refresh_all_attached(self) -> Dict[str, AttachResult]:
   576	        """
   577	        Refresh all attached UIs to match current active views.
   578	        
   579	        Convenience method that calls refresh_attached for all configured UIs.
   580	        
   581	        Returns:
   582	            Dict mapping ui_name -> AttachResult (only for UIs that were refreshed)
   583	        """
   584	        return self.refresh_attached()

   312	def get_store():
   313	    """
   314	    Get or create Store singleton.
   315	    
   316	    Reads configuration from config/settings.py to ensure Store uses
   317	    the same settings as the rest of the application and UI.
   318	    """
   319	    global _store_instance
   320	    if _store_instance is None:
   321	        from . import Store
   322	        from config.settings import get_config
   323	        
   324	        # Load application config
   325	        cfg = get_config()
   326	        
   327	        # Get Civitai API key from config
   328	        civitai_api_key = None
   329	        if hasattr(cfg, 'api') and hasattr(cfg.api, 'civitai_token'):
   330	            civitai_api_key = cfg.api.civitai_token
   331	
   332	        logger.info(
   333	            "[get_store] civitai_api_key: present=%s, length=%d",
   334	            bool(civitai_api_key),
   335	            len(civitai_api_key) if civitai_api_key else 0,
   336	        )
   337	
   338	        # Create Store with configured root and API keys
   339	        _store_instance = Store(
   340	            root=cfg.store.root,
   341	            civitai_api_key=civitai_api_key,
   342	        )
   343	        
   344	        # Store config reference for later use (e.g., ui_roots, ui_sets)
   345	        _store_instance._synapse_config = cfg
   346	        
   347	    return _store_instance

  5004	@profiles_router.get("/", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  5005	def list_profiles(store=Depends(require_initialized)):
  5006	    """List all profiles."""

  5009	
  5010	
  5011	@profiles_router.get("/status", response_model=ProfilesStatusResponse)
  5012	def get_profiles_status(
  5013	    ui_set: Optional[str] = Query(None),
  5014	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5015	):
  5016	    """
  5017	    Get complete profiles status for UI display.
  5018	    
  5019	    Returns per-UI runtime status, stack visualization, and shadowed files.
  5020	    """
  5021	    try:
  5022	        ui_targets = store.get_ui_targets(ui_set)
  5023	        
  5024	        # Load runtime directly for stack info
  5025	        runtime = store.layout.load_runtime()
  5026	        
  5027	        # Build per-UI status list
  5028	        ui_statuses = []
  5029	        for ui in ui_targets:
  5030	            stack = runtime.get_stack(ui)
  5031	            active = runtime.get_active_profile(ui)
  5032	            ui_statuses.append(UIRuntimeStatus(
  5033	                ui=ui,
  5034	                active_profile=active,
  5035	                stack=stack,
  5036	                stack_depth=len(stack),
  5037	            ))
  5038	        
  5039	        # Get status for shadowed info
  5040	        status = store.status(ui_set=ui_set)
  5041	        
  5042	        # Convert shadowed entries to dicts
  5043	        all_shadowed = []
  5044	        for entry in status.shadowed:
  5045	            all_shadowed.append({
  5046	                "ui": entry.ui if hasattr(entry, 'ui') else ui_targets[0] if ui_targets else "unknown",
  5047	                "dst_relpath": entry.dst_relpath,
  5048	                "winner_pack": entry.winner_pack,
  5049	                "loser_pack": entry.loser_pack,
  5050	            })
  5051	        
  5052	        # Count available updates (from cached check or 0)
  5053	        updates_count = getattr(store, "_cached_updates_count", 0)
  5054	        
  5055	        return ProfilesStatusResponse(
  5056	            ui_statuses=ui_statuses,
  5057	            shadowed=all_shadowed,
  5058	            shadowed_count=len(all_shadowed),
  5059	            updates_available=updates_count,
  5060	        )
  5061	    except Exception as e:
  5062	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5063	
  5064	
  5065	@profiles_router.post("/use", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  5066	def use_pack(
  5067	    request: UseRequest,
  5068	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5069	):
  5070	    """Activate a work profile for a pack."""
  5071	    try:
  5072	        result = store.use(
  5073	            request.pack,
  5074	            ui_set=request.ui_set,
  5075	            sync=request.sync,
  5076	        )
  5077	        return result.model_dump()
  5078	    except Exception as e:
  5079	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5080	
  5081	
  5082	@profiles_router.post("/back", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  5083	def back_profile(
  5084	    request: BackRequest,
  5085	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5086	):
  5087	    """Go back to previous profile."""
  5088	    try:
  5089	        result = store.back(
  5090	            ui_set=request.ui_set,
  5091	            sync=request.sync,
  5092	        )
  5093	        return result.model_dump()
  5094	    except Exception as e:
  5095	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5096	
  5097	
  5098	@profiles_router.post("/sync", response_model=SyncResponse)
  5099	def sync_profile(
  5100	    request: SyncRequest,
  5101	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5102	):
  5103	    """Sync a profile: install missing blobs and rebuild views."""
  5104	    try:
  5105	        reports = store.sync(
  5106	            profile_name=request.profile,
  5107	            ui_set=request.ui_set,
  5108	            install_missing=request.install_missing,
  5109	        )
  5110	        return SyncResponse(
  5111	            reports={ui: {
  5112	                "entries_created": r.entries_created,
  5113	                "shadowed_count": len(r.shadowed),
  5114	                "missing_count": len(r.missing_blobs),
  5115	                "errors": r.errors,
  5116	            } for ui, r in reports.items()}
  5117	        )
  5118	    except Exception as e:
  5119	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5120	
  5121	
  5122	@profiles_router.post("/reset", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  5123	def reset_to_global(
  5124	    request: ResetRequest,
  5125	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  5126	):
  5127	    """
  5128	    Reset stack to global for all UIs in ui_set.
  5129	
  5130	    This pops all work profiles and returns to just ["global"].
  5131	    Operation is atomic under store lock.
  5132	    """
  5133	    try:
  5134	        result = store.reset(ui_set=request.ui_set, sync=request.sync)
  5135	
  5136	        # Convert to legacy API format for backwards compatibility
  5137	        ui_results = {}
  5138	        for ui, from_profile in result.from_profiles.items():
  5139	            ui_results[ui] = {
  5140	                "reset": True,
  5141	                "profile": "global",
  5142	                "from_profile": from_profile,
  5143	            }
  5144	
  5145	        return {
  5146	            "ok": True,
  5147	            "reset": True,
  5148	            "ui_results": ui_results,
  5149	        }
  5150	    except Exception as e:
  5151	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
  5152	
  5153	
  5154	# NOTE: This wildcard route MUST be last in the profiles router
  5155	# to avoid shadowing specific routes like /status, /use, /back, etc.
  5156	@profiles_router.get("/{profile_name}", response_model=Dict[str, Any])
  5157	def get_profile(profile_name: str, store=Depends(require_initialized)):
  5158	    """Get profile details."""
  5159	    try:
  5160	        profile = store.load_profile(profile_name)
  5161	        return profile.model_dump()
  5162	    except Exception as e:
  5163	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=str(e))
  5164	
  5165

     1	import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
     3	import {
     4	  Layers,
     5	  ArrowLeft,
     6	  AlertTriangle,
     7	  RefreshCw,
     8	  CheckCircle,
     9	  ChevronRight,
    10	  Home,
    11	  Package
    12	} from 'lucide-react'
    13	import { toast } from '../../stores/toastStore'
    14	
    15	interface UIRuntimeStatus {
    16	  ui: string
    17	  active_profile: string
    18	  stack: string[]
    19	  stack_depth: number
    20	}
    21	
    22	interface ShadowedEntry {
    23	  ui: string
    24	  dst_relpath: string
    25	  winner_pack: string
    26	  loser_pack: string
    27	}
    28	
    29	interface ProfilesStatus {
    30	  ui_statuses: UIRuntimeStatus[]
    31	  shadowed: ShadowedEntry[]
    32	  shadowed_count: number
    33	  updates_available: number
    34	}
    35	
    36	export function ProfilesPage() {
    37	  const { t } = useTranslation()
    38	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    39	
    40	  // Fetch profiles status
    41	  const { data: status, isLoading, error, refetch } = useQuery<ProfilesStatus>({
    42	    queryKey: ['profiles-status'],
    43	    queryFn: async () => {
    44	      const res = await fetch('/api/profiles/status')
    45	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch profiles status')
    46	      return res.json()
    47	    },
    48	    refetchInterval: 5000,
    49	  })
    50	
    51	  // Back mutation
    52	  const backMutation = useMutation({
    53	    mutationFn: async (ui: string) => {
    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/profiles/back', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ ui_set: ui, sync: true }),
    58	      })
    59	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to go back')
    60	      return res.json()
    61	    },
    62	    onSuccess: (data) => {
    63	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['profiles-status'] })
    64	      toast.success(t('profiles.toast.switchedTo', { profile: data?.new_profile || 'previous profile' }))
    65	    },
    66	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    67	      toast.error(t('profiles.toast.backFailed', { error: error.message }))
    68	    },
    69	  })
    70	
    71	  // Reset mutation
    72	  const resetMutation = useMutation({
    73	    mutationFn: async (ui: string) => {
    74	      const res = await fetch('/api/profiles/reset', {
    75	        method: 'POST',
    76	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    77	        body: JSON.stringify({ ui_set: ui, sync: true }),
    78	      })
    79	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to reset')
    80	      return res.json()
    81	    },
    82	    onSuccess: () => {
    83	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['profiles-status'] })
    84	      toast.success(t('profiles.toast.resetSuccess'))
    85	    },
    86	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    87	      toast.error(t('profiles.toast.resetFailed', { error: error.message }))
    88	    },
    89	  })
    90	
    91	  if (isLoading) {
    92	    return (
    93	      <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center">
    94	        <RefreshCw className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-indigo-400" />
    95	      </div>
    96	    )
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  if (error) {
   100	    return (
   101	      <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center">
   102	        <div className="text-center">
   103	          <AlertTriangle className="w-12 h-12 text-red-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
   104	          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-200 mb-2">{t('profiles.error.title')}</h2>
   105	          <p className="text-slate-400 mb-4">{(error as Error).message}</p>
   106	          <button
   107	            onClick={() => refetch()}
   108	            className="px-4 py-2 bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-600"
   109	          >
   110	            {t('profiles.error.retry')}
   111	          </button>
   112	        </div>
   113	      </div>
   114	    )
   115	  }
   116	
   117	  return (
   118	    <div className="flex-1 p-8 overflow-auto">
   119	      {/* Header */}
   120	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
   121	        <div>
   122	          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-3">
   123	            <Layers className="w-7 h-7 text-indigo-400" />
   124	            {t('profiles.title')}
   125	          </h1>
   126	          <p className="text-slate-400 mt-1">
   127	            {t('profiles.subtitle')}
   128	          </p>
   129	        </div>
   130	
   131	        <button
   132	          onClick={() => refetch()}
   133	          className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700"
   134	        >
   135	          <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
   136	          {t('profiles.refresh')}
   137	        </button>
   138	      </div>
   139	
   140	      {/* Active Profiles Grid */}
   141	      <section className="mb-8">
   142	        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-200 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   143	          <Package className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-400" />
   144	          {t('profiles.activeProfiles')}
   145	        </h2>
   146	        
   147	        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   148	          {status?.ui_statuses.map((uiStatus) => (
   149	            <div
   150	              key={uiStatus.ui}
   151	              className="bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50 rounded-xl p-5"
   152	            >
   153	              {/* UI Name and Active Profile */}
   154	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
   155	                <div>
   156	                  <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-slate-200 capitalize">
   157	                    {uiStatus.ui}
   158	                  </h3>
   159	                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   160	                    {t('profiles.active')}: <span className="text-indigo-400 font-medium">{uiStatus.active_profile}</span>
   161	                  </p>
   162	                </div>
   163	                
   164	                {/* Actions */}
   165	                <div className="flex gap-2">
   166	                  {uiStatus.active_profile !== 'global' && (
   167	                    <>
   168	                      <button
   169	                        onClick={() => backMutation.mutate(uiStatus.ui)}
   170	                        disabled={backMutation.isPending}
   171	                        className="flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-600 disabled:opacity-50"
   172	                      >
   173	                        <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
   174	                        {t('profiles.back')}
   175	                      </button>
   176	                      <button
   177	                        onClick={() => resetMutation.mutate(uiStatus.ui)}
   178	                        disabled={resetMutation.isPending}
   179	                        className="flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-indigo-500/20 text-indigo-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-500/30 disabled:opacity-50"
   180	                      >
   181	                        <Home className="w-4 h-4" />
   182	                        {t('profiles.reset')}
   183	                      </button>
   184	                    </>
   185	                  )}
   186	                  {uiStatus.active_profile === 'global' && (
   187	                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-green-400">
   188	                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
   189	                      {t('profiles.atGlobal')}
   190	                    </span>
   191	                  )}
   192	                </div>
   193	              </div>
   194	              
   195	              {/* Stack Visualization */}
   196	              <div className="bg-slate-900/50 rounded-lg p-3">
   197	                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide">{t('profiles.stack')} ({uiStatus.stack_depth})</p>
   198	                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   199	                  {uiStatus.stack.map((profile, index) => (
   200	                    <div key={index} className="flex items-center">
   201	                      {index > 0 && <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600 mx-1" />}
   202	                      <span
   203	                        className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-sm ${
   204	                          index === uiStatus.stack.length - 1
   205	                            ? 'bg-indigo-500/20 text-indigo-400 border border-indigo-500/30'
   206	                            : 'bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400'
   207	                        }`}
   208	                      >
   209	                        {profile}
   210	                      </span>
   211	                    </div>
   212	                  ))}
   213	                </div>
   214	              </div>
   215	            </div>
   216	          ))}
   217	        </div>
   218	        
   219	        {(!status?.ui_statuses || status.ui_statuses.length === 0) && (
   220	          <div className="bg-slate-800/30 border border-slate-700/30 rounded-xl p-8 text-center">
   221	            <p className="text-slate-400">{t('profiles.noUiConfigs')}</p>
   222	          </div>
   223	        )}
   224	      </section>
   225	
   226	      {/* Shadowed Files Warning */}
   227	      {status && status.shadowed_count > 0 && (
   228	        <section>
   229	          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-200 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   230	            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
   231	            {t('profiles.shadowedCount', { count: status.shadowed_count })}
   232	          </h2>
   233	          
   234	          <div className="bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
   235	            <table className="w-full">
   236	              <thead className="bg-amber-500/10">
   237	                <tr>
   238	                  <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-amber-400">{t('profiles.table.ui')}</th>
   239	                  <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-amber-400">{t('profiles.table.filePath')}</th>
   240	                  <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-amber-400">{t('profiles.table.winner')}</th>
   241	                  <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-amber-400">{t('profiles.table.shadowed')}</th>
   242	                </tr>
   243	              </thead>
   244	              <tbody className="divide-y divide-amber-500/20">
   245	                {status.shadowed.map((entry, index) => (
   246	                  <tr key={index} className="hover:bg-amber-500/5">
   247	                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-300 capitalize">{entry.ui}</td>
   248	                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-400 font-mono">{entry.dst_relpath}</td>
   249	                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-green-400">{entry.winner_pack}</td>
   250	                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-400">{entry.loser_pack}</td>
   251	                  </tr>
   252	                ))}
   253	              </tbody>
   254	            </table>
   255	          </div>
   256	          
   257	          <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-3">
   258	            {t('profiles.shadowedExplanation')}
   259	          </p>
   260	        </section>
   261	      )}
   262	
   263	      {/* Updates Available Badge */}
   264	      {status && status.updates_available > 0 && (
   265	        <div className="mt-8 p-4 bg-indigo-500/10 border border-indigo-500/30 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-between">
   266	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   267	            <RefreshCw className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-400" />
   268	            <span className="text-slate-200">
   269	              {t('profiles.updatesAvailable', { count: status.updates_available })}
   270	            </span>
   271	          </div>
   272	          <a
   273	            href="/"
   274	            className="px-4 py-2 bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-600"
   275	          >
   276	            {t('profiles.viewPacks')}
   277	          </a>
   278	        </div>
   279	      )}
   280	    </div>
   281	  )
   282	}

   360	            <div>

   415	            {/* Store Actions */}

   455	            {t('settings.backup.title')}

   457	          <CardDescription>{t('settings.backup.subtitle')}</CardDescription>
   458

   460	            {/* Enable/Disable toggle */}
   461	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-slate-800/30 rounded-lg">
   462	              <div>

   470	                className={`relative w-12 h-6 rounded-full transition-all duration-200 ${

   473	              >

   485	                {t('settings.backup.path')}

   487	              <div className="flex gap-2">
   488	                <input
   489	                  type="text"

   491	                  onChange={(e) => setBackupPath(e.target.value)}

   493	                  disabled={!backupEnabled}
   494	                  className={`flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500/50 ${
   495	                    !backupEnabled ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''
   496	                  }`}
   497	                />
   498	              </div>
   499	              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
   500	                {t('settings.backup.pathDesc')}
   501	              </p>
   502	              <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">
   503	                💡 {t('settings.backup.gitHint')}
   504	              </p>
   505	            </div>
   506	
   507	            {/* Connection Status */}
   508	            {backupEnabled && (
   509	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-slate-800/30 rounded-lg">
   510	                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   511	                  {backupStatus?.connected ? (

   514	                      <span className="text-green-400">{t('settings.backup.connected')}</span>

   528	                    {backupStatus.free_space !== undefined && (

   531	                      </span>
   532	                    )}
   533	                  </div>
   534	                )}
   535	              </div>
   536	            )}
   537	
   538	            {/* Auto-backup new blobs */}
   539	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-slate-800/30 rounded-lg">
   540	              <div>
   541	                <span className={`${!backupEnabled ? 'text-slate-500' : 'text-slate-100'}`}>
   542	                  {t('settings.backup.autoBackup')}
   543	                </span>
   544	                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">
   545	                  {t('settings.backup.autoBackupDesc')}
   610	                  ) : (
   611	                    <>
   612	                      <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   613	                      {t('settings.tokens.notSet')}
   614	                    </>
   615	                  )}
   616	                </span>
   617	              </div>
   618	              <div className="relative">
   619	                <input
   620	                  type={showCivitaiToken ? 'text' : 'password'}
   621	                  value={civitaiToken}
   622	                  onChange={(e) => setCivitaiToken(e.target.value)}
   623	                  placeholder={settings?.civitai_token_set ? '••••••••••••••••' : t('settings.tokens.civitaiPlaceholder')}
   624	                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 pr-12 bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500/50"
   625	                />
   626	                <button
   627	                  type="button"
   628	                  onClick={() => setShowCivitaiToken(!showCivitaiToken)}
   629	                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-300"
   630	                >
   631	                  {showCivitaiToken ? <EyeOff className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Eye className="w-5 h-5" />}
   632	                </button>
   633	              </div>
   634	              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
   635	                {t('settings.tokens.civitaiLink').split('civitai.com')[0]}<a href="https://civitai.com/user/account" target="_blank" rel="noopener" className="text-indigo-400 hover:underline">civitai.com/user/account</a>
   636	              </p>
   637	            </div>
   638	
   639	            {/* HuggingFace Token */}
   640	            <div>
   641	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   642	                <label className="text-sm text-slate-400">{t('settings.tokens.huggingface')}</label>
   643	                <span className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs ${settings?.huggingface_token_set ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-amber-400'}`}>
   644	                  {settings?.huggingface_token_set ? (
   645	                    <>
   646	                      <CheckCircle2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   647	                      {t('settings.tokens.configured')}
   648	                    </>
   649	                  ) : (
   650	                    <>
   651	                      <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   652	                      {t('settings.tokens.notSet')}
   653	                    </>
   654	                  )}
   655	                </span>
   656	              </div>
   657	              <div className="relative">
   658	                <input
   659	                  type={showHfToken ? 'text' : 'password'}
   660	                  value={hfToken}
   661	                  onChange={(e) => setHfToken(e.target.value)}
   662	                  placeholder={settings?.huggingface_token_set ? '••••••••••••••••' : t('settings.tokens.huggingfacePlaceholder')}
   663	                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 pr-12 bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500/50"
   664	                />
   665	                <button
   666	                  type="button"
   667	                  onClick={() => setShowHfToken(!showHfToken)}
   668	                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-300"
   669	                >
   670	                  {showHfToken ? <EyeOff className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Eye className="w-5 h-5" />}
   671	                </button>
   672	              </div>
   673	              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
   674	                {t('settings.tokens.huggingfaceLink').split('huggingface.co')[0]}<a href="https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens" target="_blank" rel="noopener" className="text-indigo-400 hover:underline">huggingface.co/settings/tokens</a>
   675	              </p>
   676	            </div>
   677	          </div>
   678	        </Card>
   679	
   680	        {/* 6. AI Assistant (Avatar Engine) Settings */}
   681	        <AvatarSettings ref={avatarSettingsRef} />
   682	
   683	        {/* 8. Diagnostics */}
   684	        <Card>
   685	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   686	            <div>
   687	              <CardTitle>
   688	                <Settings className="w-5 h-5 inline-block mr-2 text-indigo-400" />
   689	                {t('settings.diagnostics.title')}
   690	              </CardTitle>

    84	@router.get("/status", response_model=StatusResponse)
    85	async def get_status():
    86	    """Get system status using v2 Store."""
    87	    config = get_config()
    88	    
    89	    # Check ComfyUI
    90	    comfyui_path = Path(config.comfyui.base_path).expanduser()
    91	    comfyui_found = comfyui_path.exists()
    92	    
    93	    # Check store
    94	    store = get_store()
    95	    store_initialized = store.layout.is_initialized() if store else False
    96	    
    97	    # Count packs and profiles from v2 store
    98	    packs_count = 0
    99	    profiles_count = 0
   100	    if store_initialized:
   101	        try:
   102	            packs_count = len(store.list_packs())
   103	            profiles_count = len(store.layout.list_profiles())
   104	        except Exception:
   105	            pass
   106	    
   107	    return StatusResponse(
   108	        status="running",
   109	        version=VERSION,
   110	        store_initialized=store_initialized,
   111	        store_root=str(config.store.root),
   112	        comfyui_path=str(config.comfyui.base_path),
   113	        comfyui_found=comfyui_found,
   114	        packs_count=packs_count,
   115	        profiles_count=profiles_count,
   116	        nsfw_blur_enabled=config.ui.nsfw_blur_enabled,
   117	    )

   120	@router.get("/diagnostics", response_model=DiagnosticsResponse)
   120	@router.get("/diagnostics", response_model=DiagnosticsResponse)
   121	async def get_diagnostics():
   122	    """Run system diagnostics using v2 Store."""
   123	    config = get_config()
   124	    store = get_store()
   125	    
   126	    issues: List[DiagnosticIssue] = []
   127	    
   128	    # Check ComfyUI
   129	    comfyui_path = Path(config.comfyui.base_path).expanduser()
   130	    comfyui_found = comfyui_path.exists()
   131	    if not comfyui_found:
   132	        issues.append(DiagnosticIssue(
   133	            level="warning",
   134	            message=f"ComfyUI not found at {comfyui_path}",
   135	            suggestion="Update ComfyUI path in settings",
   136	        ))
   137	    
   138	    # Check store
   139	    store_initialized = store.layout.is_initialized() if store else False
   140	    if not store_initialized:
   141	        issues.append(DiagnosticIssue(
   142	            level="error",
   143	            message="Store not initialized",
   144	            suggestion="Run 'synapse init' or click Init Store in Settings",
   145	        ))
   146	    
   147	    packs_count = 0
   148	    profiles_count = 0
   149	    blobs_count = 0
   150	    missing_blobs = 0
   151	    unresolved_deps = 0
   152	    ui_attach_status = {}
   153	    
   154	    if store_initialized:
   155	        try:
   156	            packs_count = len(store.list_packs())
   157	            profiles_count = len(store.layout.list_profiles())
   158	            
   159	            # Count blobs
   160	            blobs_dir = store.layout.blobs_path
   161	            if blobs_dir.exists():
   162	                blobs_count = sum(1 for _ in blobs_dir.rglob("*") if _.is_file())
   163	            
   164	            # Check status for missing/unresolved
   165	            status = store.status()
   166	            missing_blobs = len(status.missing_blobs)
   167	            unresolved_deps = len(status.unresolved)
   168	            
   169	            if missing_blobs > 0:
   170	                issues.append(DiagnosticIssue(
   171	                    level="warning",
   172	                    message=f"{missing_blobs} missing blob(s)",
   173	                    suggestion="Run 'synapse doctor' to fix",
   174	                ))
   175	            
   176	            if unresolved_deps > 0:
   177	                issues.append(DiagnosticIssue(
   178	                    level="warning",
   179	                    message=f"{unresolved_deps} unresolved dependency(s)",
   180	                    suggestion="Run 'synapse resolve' on affected packs",
   181	                ))
   182	            
   183	            # Get attach status
   184	            ui_attach_status = store.get_attach_status()
   185	            
   186	        except Exception as e:
   187	            issues.append(DiagnosticIssue(
   188	                level="error",
   189	                message=f"Error reading store: {e}",
   190	            ))
   191	    
   192	    return DiagnosticsResponse(
   193	        store_initialized=store_initialized,
   194	        store_root=str(config.store.root),
   195	        comfyui_found=comfyui_found,
   196	        comfyui_path=str(comfyui_path),
   197	        packs_count=packs_count,
   198	        profiles_count=profiles_count,
   199	        blobs_count=blobs_count,
   200	        missing_blobs=missing_blobs,
   201	        unresolved_deps=unresolved_deps,
   202	        ui_attach_status=ui_attach_status,
   203	        issues=issues,
   204	    )
   205	
   205	
   206	
   207	@router.get("/settings", response_model=SettingsResponse)
   208	async def get_settings():
   209	    """Get current settings."""
   210	    config = get_config()
   211	    
   212	    return SettingsResponse(
   213	        comfyui_path=str(config.comfyui.base_path),
   214	        synapse_data_path=str(config.data_path),
   215	        nsfw_blur_enabled=config.ui.nsfw_blur_enabled,
   216	        civitai_token_set=bool(config.api.civitai_token),
   217	        huggingface_token_set=bool(config.api.huggingface_token),
   218	        store_root=str(config.store.root),
   219	        store_ui_roots=config.store.ui_roots.to_dict(),
   220	        store_default_ui_set=config.store.default_ui_set,
   221	        store_ui_sets=config.store.ui_sets,
   222	    )

   225	@router.patch("/settings", response_model=SettingsResponse)
   226	async def update_settings(update: SettingsUpdate):
   227	    """Update settings."""
   228	    from config.settings import UIRoots
   229	    
   230	    config = get_config()
   231	    
   232	    if update.comfyui_path is not None:
   233	        config.comfyui.base_path = Path(update.comfyui_path).expanduser()
   234	    
   235	    if update.nsfw_blur_enabled is not None:
   236	        config.ui.nsfw_blur_enabled = update.nsfw_blur_enabled
   237	    
   238	    if update.civitai_token is not None:
   239	        config.api.civitai_token = update.civitai_token
   240	    
   241	    if update.huggingface_token is not None:
   242	        config.api.huggingface_token = update.huggingface_token
   243	    
   244	    # Store v2 settings
   245	    store_changed = False
   246	    
   247	    if update.store_root is not None:
   248	        config.store.root = Path(update.store_root).expanduser()
   249	        store_changed = True
   250	    
   251	    if update.store_ui_roots is not None:
   252	        config.store.ui_roots = UIRoots.from_dict(update.store_ui_roots)
   253	        store_changed = True
   254	    
   255	    if update.store_default_ui_set is not None:
   256	        config.store.default_ui_set = update.store_default_ui_set
   257	    
   258	    if update.store_ui_sets is not None:
   259	        config.store.ui_sets = update.store_ui_sets
   260	    
   261	    config.save()
   262	
   263	    # Reset store singleton if store settings or API keys changed
   264	    api_key_changed = update.civitai_token is not None or update.huggingface_token is not None
   265	    if store_changed or api_key_changed:

   101	@dataclass
   102	class UIRoots:

   104	    comfyui: Path = field(default_factory=lambda: Path.home() / "ComfyUI")

   114	            "sdnext": str(self.sdnext),
   115	        }
   116	    
   117	    @classmethod
   118	    def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'UIRoots':

   124	        )

   127	@dataclass
   128	class StoreSettings:

   130	    root: Path = field(default_factory=lambda: Path.home() / ".synapse" / "store")
   131	    ui_roots: UIRoots = field(default_factory=UIRoots)
   132	    default_ui_set: str = "local"
   133	    ui_sets: dict = field(default_factory=lambda: {
   134	        # Named sets
   135	        "local": ["comfyui", "forge"],
   136	        "all": ["comfyui", "forge", "a1111", "sdnext"],
   137	        # Implicit singleton sets - each UI can be targeted directly
   138	        "comfyui": ["comfyui"],
   139	        "forge": ["forge"],
   140	        "a1111": ["a1111"],
   141	        "sdnext": ["sdnext"],
   142	    })
   143	    
   144	    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
   145	        return {
   146	            "root": str(self.root),
   147	            "ui_roots": self.ui_roots.to_dict(),
   148	            "default_ui_set": self.default_ui_set,
   149	            "ui_sets": self.ui_sets,
   150	        }
   150	        }
   151	    
   152	    @classmethod
   153	    def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'StoreSettings':
   154	        ui_roots = UIRoots.from_dict(data.get("ui_roots", {}))

   156	            "local": ["comfyui", "forge"],
   157	            "all": ["comfyui", "forge", "a1111", "sdnext"],
   158	            "comfyui": ["comfyui"],
   159	            "forge": ["forge"],
   160	            "a1111": ["a1111"],
   161	            "sdnext": ["sdnext"],
   162	        }
   163	        return cls(
   164	            root=Path(data.get("root", str(Path.home() / ".synapse" / "store"))),
   165	            ui_roots=ui_roots,
   166	            default_ui_set=data.get("default_ui_set", "local"),
   167	            ui_sets=data.get("ui_sets", default_ui_sets),
   168	        )

 succeeded in 0ms:
   450	        sync: bool = False,

   453	    ) -> UpdateResult:
   454	        """
   455	        High-level update command.
   456	
   457	        Args:
   458	            pack_name: Pack to update
   459	            dry_run: If True, only plan without applying
   460	            choose: Optional file selections for ambiguous updates
   461	            sync: If True, download new blobs and rebuild views
   462	            ui_targets: UI targets for sync (required if sync=True)
   463	            options: Optional update options (merge previews, etc.)

   468	        # Create plan
   469	        plan = self.plan_update(pack_name)
   470	
   471	        if plan.already_up_to_date:
   472	            return UpdateResult(
   473	                pack=pack_name,
   474	                applied=False,
   475	                lock_updated=False,
   476	                synced=False,
   477	                ui_targets=[],
   478	                already_up_to_date=True,
   479	            )
   480	
   481	        if dry_run:
   482	            return UpdateResult(
   483	                pack=pack_name,
   484	                applied=False,
   485	                lock_updated=False,
   486	                synced=False,
   487	                ui_targets=[],
   488	                already_up_to_date=False,
   489	            )
   490	
   491	        # Apply update
   492	        lock = self.apply_update(pack_name, plan, choose)
   493	
   494	        result = UpdateResult(
   495	            pack=pack_name,
   496	            applied=True,
   497	            lock_updated=True,
   498	            synced=False,
   499	            ui_targets=ui_targets or [],
   500	        )
   501	
   502	        # Apply options (merge previews, update description, etc.)
   503	        if options:
   504	            self._apply_options(pack_name, options, result)
   505	
   506	        # Sync if requested
   507	        if sync and ui_targets:
   508	            result.synced = self._sync_after_update(pack_name, lock, ui_targets)
   509	
   510	        return result
   511	
   512	    def _apply_options(
   513	        self,
   514	        pack_name: str,
   515	        options: UpdateOptions,
   516	        result: UpdateResult,
   517	    ) -> None:
   518	        """Apply update options by delegating to the pack's provider."""
   519	        pack = self.layout.load_pack(pack_name)
   520	        provider = self._get_provider_for_pack(pack)
   602	    def _sync_after_update(
   603	        self,
   604	        pack_name: str,
   605	        lock: PackLock,
   606	        ui_targets: List[str],
   607	    ) -> bool:
   608	        """Download new blobs and rebuild views after update."""
   609	        try:
   610	            # Download new blobs
   611	            for resolved in lock.resolved:
   612	                sha256 = resolved.artifact.sha256
   613	                urls = resolved.artifact.download.urls
   614	
   615	                if sha256 and not self.blob_store.blob_exists(sha256) and urls and len(urls) > 0:
   616	                    try:
   617	                        self.blob_store.download(urls[0], sha256)
   618	                    except Exception as e:
   619	                        logger.warning("Failed to download blob %s: %s", sha256[:12], e)
   620	
   621	            # Rebuild views for each UI
   622	            runtime = self.layout.load_runtime()
   623	
   624	            for ui in ui_targets:
   625	                active_profile = runtime.get_active_profile(ui)
   626	                if active_profile:
   627	                    try:
   628	                        profile = self.layout.load_profile(active_profile)
   629	                        # Load packs for profile
   630	                        packs_data = {}
   631	                        for p in profile.packs:
   632	                            try:
   633	                                pack = self.layout.load_pack(p.name)
   634	                                pack_lock = self.layout.load_pack_lock(p.name)
   635	                                packs_data[p.name] = (pack, pack_lock)
   636	                            except Exception:
   637	                                continue
   638	
   639	                        self.view_builder.build(ui, profile, packs_data)
   640	                        self.view_builder.activate(ui, active_profile)
   641	                    except Exception as e:
   642	                        logger.warning("Failed to rebuild views for UI %s: %s", ui, e)
   643	
   644	            return True
   645	        except Exception:
   646	            return False
   647	
   648	    # =========================================================================

   495	            table.add_row(name, ptype, active_str)

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba plans/PLAN-Updates.md | sed -n '118,145p;886,922p'" in /home/box/git/github/synapse
 succeeded in 0ms:
   118	│    POST /api/updates/apply { pack, sync: true }                 │
   119	│    ↓                                                            │
   120	│    UpdateService.apply_update():                                │
   121	│    ├── Update lock.json:                                        │
   122	│    │   ├── version_id → new version_id                          │
   123	│    │   ├── sha256 → new sha256                                  │
   124	│    │   └── download_url → new URL                               │
   125	│    │                                                            │
   126	│    ├── If sync=true:                                            │
   127	│    │   ├── Download new blob to blobs/sha256/XX/XXXX...         │
   128	│    │   └── Rebuild views (symlinks) for active UIs              │
   129	│    │                                                            │
   130	│    └── Return UpdateResult { applied: true }                    │
   131	│                                                                 │
   132	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   133	```
   134	
   135	### 2.3 What Gets Updated vs Preserved
   136	
   137	```
   138	┌──────────────────────────┬─────────────┬─────────────────────────┐
   139	│ File                     │ Updated?    │ Notes                   │
   140	├──────────────────────────┼─────────────┼─────────────────────────┤
   141	│ lock.json                │ ✅ YES      │ version_id, sha256      │
   142	│ blobs/sha256/...         │ ✅ YES      │ New model file          │
   143	│ views/                   │ ✅ YES      │ Symlinks rebuilt        │
   144	├──────────────────────────┼─────────────┼─────────────────────────┤
   145	│ pack.json:name           │ ❌ NO       │ User's name preserved   │
   886	`_sync_after_update()` (update_service.py, existed on main since first commit) does
   887	**synchronous** `blob_store.download()` directly in the API request handler. This was a
   888	parallel download path bypassing the existing download infrastructure (no progress, no
   889	Downloads tab, no validation, no ComfyUI symlinks).
   890	
   891	### 13.2 Fix Applied (commit 33df068)
   892	
   893	Frontend now uses `sync: false` and routes all downloads through the existing
   894	`download-asset` endpoint:
   895	
   896	```
   897	STEP 1: Apply (lock only, no download)
   898	  POST /api/updates/apply { sync: false }
   899	  → Updates lock.json with new version_id, sha256, URLs
   900	  → Returns immediately: { applied: true }
   901	
   902	STEP 2: Frontend queues downloads via existing system
   903	  updatesStore.ts → queueDownloadsForPack():
   904	  For each changed dependency:
   905	    POST /api/packs/{name}/download-asset { asset_name: dep_id }
   906	    → Background thread, progress tracking, Downloads tab ✅
   907	    → File validation, ComfyUI symlinks, SHA256 verification ✅
   908	```
   909	
   910	### 13.3 Changes Made
   911	
   912	| File | Change |
   913	|------|--------|
   914	| `updatesStore.ts` | `sync: false` in applyUpdate + applySelected |
   915	| `updatesStore.ts` | Added `queueDownloadsForPack()` helper |
   916	| `api.py` | `DownloadAssetRequest.asset_type` now optional (falls back to dep.kind) |
   917	
   918	### 13.4 `_sync_after_update` kept for CLI
   919	
   920	The CLI (`synapse update <pack> --sync`) still uses `_sync_after_update` because
   921	CLI doesn't have a Downloads tab. The web frontend MUST NOT use it.
   922

   247	
   248	---
   249	
   250	## 3. Nova API - Inventory Service
   251	
   252	### 3.1 Datovy model
   253	
   254	```python
   255	# Novy soubor: src/store/inventory_service.py
   256	
   257	class BlobStatus(str, Enum):
   258	    """Status blobu v inventari."""
   259	    REFERENCED = "referenced"   # Blob existuje lokalne a je referencovany packem
   260	    ORPHAN = "orphan"           # Blob existuje lokalne, ale zadny pack ho nereferencuje
   261	    MISSING = "missing"         # Pack referencuje, ale blob neexistuje NIKDE (ani backup)
   262	    BACKUP_ONLY = "backup_only" # 🆕 Blob NENI lokalne, ale JE na backup storage
   263	
   264	class BlobLocation(str, Enum):
   265	    """Kde se blob fyzicky nachazi."""
   266	    LOCAL_ONLY = "local_only"       # Pouze na lokalnim disku
   267	    BACKUP_ONLY = "backup_only"     # Pouze na backup zarizeni
   268	    BOTH = "both"                   # Na obou mistech (synchronizovano)
   269	    NOWHERE = "nowhere"             # Nikde (MISSING stav)
   270	
   271	class BlobOrigin(BaseModel):
   272	    """Puvod blobu - odkud pochazi."""
   273	    provider: ProviderName
   274	    model_id: Optional[int] = None
   275	    version_id: Optional[int] = None
   276	    file_id: Optional[int] = None
   277	    filename: Optional[str] = None
   278	    repo_id: Optional[str] = None      # Pro HuggingFace
   279	
   280	class InventoryItem(BaseModel):
   281	    """Jedna polozka inventare."""
   282	    sha256: str
   283	    kind: AssetKind
   284	    display_name: str                   # Priorita: expose.filename > origin.filename > sha256[:12]
   285	    size_bytes: int
   286	
   287	    # 🆕 Lokace blobu
   288	    location: BlobLocation              # LOCAL_ONLY, BACKUP_ONLY, BOTH, NOWHERE
   289	    on_local: bool                      # Je na lokalnim disku?
   290	    on_backup: bool                     # Je na backup zarizeni?
   291	    status: BlobStatus
   292	    used_by_packs: List[str]            # Seznam nazvu packu
   293	    ref_count: int                      # Pocet referenci (muze byt > pocet packu)
   294	    origin: Optional[BlobOrigin] = None # Kde se vzal
   295	    active_in_uis: List[str] = []       # Ktera UI ho prave pouzivaji
   296	    verified: Optional[bool] = None     # True/False/None (neovereno)
   297	
   298	class InventorySummary(BaseModel):
   299	    """Souhrn statistiky inventare."""
   300	    blobs_total: int
   301	    blobs_referenced: int
   302	    blobs_orphan: int
   303	    blobs_missing: int
   304	    bytes_total: int
   305	    bytes_referenced: int
   306	    bytes_orphan: int
   307	    bytes_by_kind: Dict[str, int]       # checkpoint: 50GB, lora: 2GB, ...
   308	
   309	class InventoryResponse(BaseModel):

    21	    def test_compute_plan_empty_profile(self):
    22	        """Test computing plan for empty profile."""
    23	        from src.store import (
    24	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder, 
    25	            Profile, AssetKind
    26	        )
    27	        
    28	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
    29	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
    30	            layout.init_store()
    31	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
    32	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
    33	            
    34	            profile = Profile(name="test")
    35	            
    36	            plan = builder.compute_plan("comfyui", profile, {})

    38	            assert plan.ui == "comfyui"
    39	            assert plan.profile == "test"

    43	    def test_compute_plan_with_pack(self):
    44	        """Test computing plan with a pack."""
    45	        from src.store import (
    46	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder,
    47	            Profile, ProfilePackEntry, Pack, PackLock, PackSource,
    48	            PackDependency, DependencySelector, ExposeConfig,
    49	            ResolvedDependency, ResolvedArtifact, ArtifactProvider,
    50	            AssetKind, ProviderName, SelectorStrategy
    51	        )
    52	        
    53	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
    54	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
    55	            layout.init_store()
    56	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
    57	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
    58	            
    59	            # Create test blob
    60	            content = b"test model content"
    61	            sha256 = hashlib.sha256(content).hexdigest()
    62	            blob_path = blob_store.blob_path(sha256)
    63	            blob_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    64	            blob_path.write_bytes(content)
    65	            
    66	            # Create pack
    67	            pack = Pack(
    68	                name="TestPack",
    69	                pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
    70	                source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI, model_id=123),
    71	                dependencies=[
    72	                    PackDependency(
    73	                        id="main_lora",
    74	                        kind=AssetKind.LORA,
    75	                        selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
    76	                        expose=ExposeConfig(filename="test_lora.safetensors"),
    77	                    )
    78	                ],
    79	            )
    80	            
    81	            # Create lock
    82	            lock = PackLock(
    83	                pack="TestPack",
    84	                resolved=[
    85	                    ResolvedDependency(
    86	                        dependency_id="main_lora",
    87	                        artifact=ResolvedArtifact(
    88	                            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
    89	                            sha256=sha256,
    90	                            provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
    91	                        ),
    92	                    )
    93	                ],
    94	            )
    95	            
    96	            # Create profile
    97	            profile = Profile(
    98	                name="test",
    99	                packs=[ProfilePackEntry(name="TestPack")],
   100	            )
   101	            
   102	            # Compute plan
   103	            plan = builder.compute_plan(
   104	                "comfyui",
   105	                profile,
   106	                {"TestPack": (pack, lock)},
   107	            )
   108	            
   109	            assert len(plan.entries) == 1
   110	            entry = plan.entries[0]
   111	            assert entry.pack_name == "TestPack"
   112	            assert entry.expose_filename == "test_lora.safetensors"
   113	            assert entry.sha256 == sha256
   114	            assert "loras" in entry.dst_relpath
   115	    
   116	    def test_last_wins_conflict_resolution(self):
   117	        """Test that later packs shadow earlier ones."""
   118	        from src.store import (
   119	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder,
   120	            Profile, ProfilePackEntry, Pack, PackLock, PackSource,
   121	            PackDependency, DependencySelector, ExposeConfig,
   122	            ResolvedDependency, ResolvedArtifact, ArtifactProvider,
   123	            AssetKind, ProviderName, SelectorStrategy
   124	        )
   125	        
   126	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   127	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
   128	            layout.init_store()
   129	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
   130	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
   131	            
   132	            # Create blobs
   133	            content1 = b"pack1 content"
   134	            content2 = b"pack2 content"
   135	            sha1 = hashlib.sha256(content1).hexdigest()
   136	            sha2 = hashlib.sha256(content2).hexdigest()
   137	            
   138	            for sha, content in [(sha1, content1), (sha2, content2)]:
   139	                path = blob_store.blob_path(sha)
   140	                path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   141	                path.write_bytes(content)
   142	            
   143	            # Same filename in both packs
   144	            filename = "shared_lora.safetensors"
   145	            
   146	            packs_data = {}
   147	            for i, sha in enumerate([sha1, sha2], 1):
   148	                pack = Pack(
   149	                    name=f"Pack{i}",
   150	                    pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
   151	                    source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   152	                    dependencies=[
   153	                        PackDependency(
   154	                            id="main",
   155	                            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   156	                            selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
   157	                            expose=ExposeConfig(filename=filename),
   158	                        )
   159	                    ],
   160	                )
   161	                lock = PackLock(
   162	                    pack=f"Pack{i}",
   163	                    resolved=[
   164	                        ResolvedDependency(
   165	                            dependency_id="main",
   166	                            artifact=ResolvedArtifact(
   167	                                kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   168	                                sha256=sha,
   169	                                provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   170	                            ),
   171	                        )
   172	                    ],
   173	                )
   174	                packs_data[f"Pack{i}"] = (pack, lock)
   175	            
   176	            # Profile with Pack1 first, Pack2 last
   177	            profile = Profile(
   178	                name="test",
   179	                packs=[
   180	                    ProfilePackEntry(name="Pack1"),
   181	                    ProfilePackEntry(name="Pack2"),
   182	                ],
   183	            )
   184	            
   185	            plan = builder.compute_plan("comfyui", profile, packs_data)
   186	            
   187	            # Should have one entry (Pack2 wins)
   188	            assert len(plan.entries) == 1
   189	            assert plan.entries[0].pack_name == "Pack2"
   190	            assert plan.entries[0].sha256 == sha2
   191	            
   192	            # Should have one shadowed entry
   193	            assert len(plan.shadowed) == 1
   194	            assert plan.shadowed[0].winner_pack == "Pack2"
   195	            assert plan.shadowed[0].loser_pack == "Pack1"
   196	    
   197	    def test_build_creates_symlinks(self):
   198	        """Test that build creates working symlinks."""
   199	        from src.store import (
   200	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder,
   201	            Profile, ProfilePackEntry, Pack, PackLock, PackSource,
   202	            PackDependency, DependencySelector, ExposeConfig,
   203	            ResolvedDependency, ResolvedArtifact, ArtifactProvider,
   204	            AssetKind, ProviderName, SelectorStrategy
   205	        )
   206	        
   207	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   208	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
   209	            layout.init_store()
   210	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)
   211	            builder = ViewBuilder(layout, blob_store)
   212	            
   213	            # Create blob
   214	            content = b"lora content"
   215	            sha256 = hashlib.sha256(content).hexdigest()
   216	            blob_path = blob_store.blob_path(sha256)
   217	            blob_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   218	            blob_path.write_bytes(content)
   219	            
   220	            # Create pack and lock
   221	            pack = Pack(
   222	                name="TestPack",
   223	                pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
   224	                source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   225	                dependencies=[
   226	                    PackDependency(
   227	                        id="main",
   228	                        kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   229	                        selector=DependencySelector(strategy=SelectorStrategy.CIVITAI_FILE),
   230	                        expose=ExposeConfig(filename="my_lora.safetensors"),
   231	                    )
   232	                ],
   233	            )
   234	            lock = PackLock(
   235	                pack="TestPack",
   236	                resolved=[
   237	                    ResolvedDependency(
   238	                        dependency_id="main",
   239	                        artifact=ResolvedArtifact(
   240	                            kind=AssetKind.LORA,
   241	                            sha256=sha256,
   242	                            provider=ArtifactProvider(name=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   243	                        ),
   244	                    )
   245	                ],
   246	            )
   247	            
   248	            profile = Profile(
   249	                name="test",
   250	                packs=[ProfilePackEntry(name="TestPack")],
   251	            )
   252	            
   253	            # Build
   254	            report = builder.build("comfyui", profile, {"TestPack": (pack, lock)})
   255	            
   256	            assert report.entries_created == 1
   257	            assert len(report.errors) == 0
   258	            
   259	            # Check symlink exists
   260	            expected_link = layout.view_profile_path("comfyui", "test") / "models" / "loras" / "my_lora.safetensors"
   261	            assert expected_link.exists()
   262	            assert expected_link.is_symlink()
   263	            
   264	            # Check symlink points to blob
   265	            assert expected_link.resolve() == blob_path.resolve()
   266	            
   267	            # Check content is accessible
   268	            assert expected_link.read_bytes() == content

   270	    def test_activate_profile(self):
   271	        """Test activating a profile."""
   272	        from src.store import (
   273	            StoreLayout, BlobStore, ViewBuilder, Profile
   274	        )
   275	        
   276	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   277	            layout = StoreLayout(Path(tmpdir))
   278	            layout.init_store()
   279	            blob_store = BlobStore(layout)

   289	            # Check active symlink

   402	    def test_use_command(self):
   403	        """Test 'use' command workflow."""
   404	        from src.store import (
   405	            Store, Pack, PackSource, PackLock, 
   406	            AssetKind, ProviderName
   407	        )
   408	        
   409	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   410	            store = Store(Path(tmpdir))
   411	            store.init()
   412	            
   413	            # Create pack
   414	            pack = Pack(
   415	                name="TestPack",
   416	                pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
   417	                source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   418	            )
   419	            store.layout.save_pack(pack)
   420	            store.layout.save_pack_lock(PackLock(pack="TestPack"))
   421	            store.profile_service.add_pack_to_global("TestPack")
   422	            
   423	            # Use pack
   424	            result = store.profile_service.use(
   425	                "TestPack",
   426	                ui_targets=["comfyui"],
   427	                sync=False,
   428	            )
   429	            
   430	            assert result.pack == "TestPack"
   431	            assert result.created_profile == "work__TestPack"
   432	            assert "comfyui" in result.ui_targets
   433	            
   434	            # Check runtime stack updated
   435	            runtime = store.layout.load_runtime()
   436	            assert runtime.get_active_profile("comfyui") == "work__TestPack"

   438	    def test_back_command(self):
   439	        """Test 'back' command workflow."""
   440	        from src.store import (
   441	            Store, Pack, PackSource, PackLock,
   442	            AssetKind, ProviderName
   443	        )

   445	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
   446	            store = Store(Path(tmpdir))
   447	            store.init()
   448	            
   449	            # Create pack
   450	            pack = Pack(
   451	                name="TestPack",
   452	                pack_type=AssetKind.LORA,
   453	                source=PackSource(provider=ProviderName.CIVITAI),
   454	            )
   455	            store.layout.save_pack(pack)
   456	            store.layout.save_pack_lock(PackLock(pack="TestPack"))
   457	            store.profile_service.add_pack_to_global("TestPack")
   458	            
   459	            # Use then back
   460	            store.profile_service.use("TestPack", ["comfyui"], sync=False)
   461	            result = store.profile_service.back(["comfyui"], sync=False)

   464	            assert result.to_profile == "global"

   468	            assert runtime.get_active_profile("comfyui") == "global"

    21	class TestUIAttacher:
    22	    """Tests for UIAttacher functionality."""
    23	    
    24	    @pytest.fixture
    25	    def setup_store_with_view(self, tmp_path):
    26	        """Set up a store with an active view for testing."""
    27	        from src.store import Store
    28	        from src.store.models import Profile, ProfilePackEntry
    29	        
    30	        # Create store
    31	        store = Store(tmp_path / "store")
    32	        store.init()
    33	        
    34	        # Create a fake active view structure manually
    35	        # This simulates what sync() would create
    36	        view_loras = store.layout.view_ui_path("comfyui") / "profiles" / "global" / "models" / "loras"
    37	        view_loras.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    38	        
    39	        # Create a fake model file in the view
    40	        fake_model = view_loras / "test_model.safetensors"
    41	        fake_model.write_text("fake model content")
    42	        
    43	        # Create active symlink
    44	        active_path = store.layout.view_active_path("comfyui")
    45	        active_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    46	        profile_path = store.layout.view_profile_path("comfyui", "global")
    47	        active_path.symlink_to(profile_path)
    48	        
    49	        # Create fake UI root
    50	        ui_root = tmp_path / "ComfyUI"
    51	        ui_root.mkdir(parents=True)
    52	        
    53	        return store, ui_root
    54	    
    55	    def test_attach_creates_symlinks(self, setup_store_with_view):
    56	        """Test that attach creates correct symlinks."""
    57	        store, ui_root = setup_store_with_view
    58	        
    59	        from src.store.ui_attach import UIAttacher
    60	        
    61	        # Create attacher with fake UI root
    62	        attacher = UIAttacher(
    63	            layout=store.layout,
    64	            ui_roots={"comfyui": ui_root},
    65	        )
    66	        
    67	        # Attach
    68	        result = attacher.attach("comfyui")
    69	        
    70	        # Verify result
    71	        assert result.success, f"Attach failed: {result.errors}"
    72	        assert result.method == "symlink"
    73	        assert len(result.created) > 0, "No symlinks created"
    74	        
    75	        # Verify symlink exists and points to correct location
    76	        loras_synapse = ui_root / "models" / "loras" / "synapse"
    77	        assert loras_synapse.is_symlink(), f"Symlink not created: {loras_synapse}"
    78	        
    79	        # Verify target contains our model
    80	        target = loras_synapse.resolve()
    81	        assert target.exists(), f"Target doesn't exist: {target}"
    82	        
    83	        # Check model file is accessible through symlink
    84	        model_via_link = loras_synapse / "test_model.safetensors"
    85	        assert model_via_link.exists(), f"Model not accessible via symlink: {model_via_link}"
    86	    
    87	    def test_detach_removes_symlinks(self, setup_store_with_view):
    88	        """Test that detach removes symlinks."""
    89	        store, ui_root = setup_store_with_view
    90	        
    91	        from src.store.ui_attach import UIAttacher
    92	        
    93	        attacher = UIAttacher(
    94	            layout=store.layout,
    95	            ui_roots={"comfyui": ui_root},
    96	        )
    97	        
    98	        # First attach
    99	        attach_result = attacher.attach("comfyui")
   100	        assert attach_result.success

   420	    def test_comfyui_yaml_backup_and_restore(self, setup_store_with_yaml_view):
   421	        """Test that ComfyUI attach creates backup and detach restores it."""
   422	        store, ui_root = setup_store_with_yaml_view
   423	        
   424	        from src.store.ui_attach import UIAttacher
   425	        import yaml
   426	        
   427	        attacher = UIAttacher(
   428	            layout=store.layout,
   429	            ui_roots={"comfyui": ui_root},
   430	        )
   431	        
   432	        yaml_path = ui_root / "extra_model_paths.yaml"
   433	        backup_path = ui_root / "extra_model_paths.yaml.synapse.bak"
   434	        
   435	        # Create original YAML with some content
   436	        original_content = {"my_paths": {"loras": "/some/path"}}
   437	        with open(yaml_path, "w") as f:
   438	            yaml.dump(original_content, f)
   439	        original_bytes = yaml_path.read_bytes()
   440	        
   441	        # Attach - should create backup
   442	        result = attacher.attach("comfyui", use_yaml=True)
   443	        assert result.success
   444	        assert backup_path.exists(), "Backup should be created"
   445	        assert backup_path.read_bytes() == original_bytes, "Backup should be identical"
   446	        
   447	        # Verify synapse section was added
   448	        with open(yaml_path) as f:
   449	            content = yaml.safe_load(f)
   450	        assert "synapse" in content
   451	        assert "my_paths" in content  # Original content preserved
   452	        
   453	        # Detach - should restore from backup
   454	        detach_result = attacher.detach("comfyui")
   455	        assert detach_result.success
   456	        assert not backup_path.exists(), "Backup should be deleted after restore"
   457	        assert yaml_path.read_bytes() == original_bytes, "Original should be restored"
