# Profiles App-Connection Audit

## 1. WHAT EXISTS TODAY

### Detection of installed UIs

- There is no real discovery/scanning system for installed UIs.
- UI roots are configured, not detected.
- Default roots are hardcoded in `config/settings.py:101-124`:
  - `comfyui` -> `~/ComfyUI`
  - `forge` -> `~/stable-diffusion-webui-forge`
  - `a1111` -> `~/stable-diffusion-webui`
  - `sdnext` -> `~/sdnext`
- API store creation passes app config into the store singleton for UI roots at `src/store/api.py:312-345`.
- `UIAttacher.status()` checks whether a configured root exists at `src/store/ui_attach.py:479-486`.
- `UIAttacher.attach()` also checks whether the configured root exists before attaching at `src/store/ui_attach.py:307-327`.
- `/api/system/status` only checks ComfyUI existence, not Forge/A1111/SD.Next, at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:84-117`.
- `/api/system/diagnostics` also only has a direct ComfyUI path check at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:128-136`.
- `/api/system/diagnostics` includes `store.get_attach_status()` at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:183-184`, but that is attachment status for configured UI targets, not installed-UI discovery.
- Settings exposes manual UI roots in the frontend at `apps/web/src/components/modules/SettingsPage.tsx:55-63`.
- Settings renders editable UI root inputs at `apps/web/src/components/modules/SettingsPage.tsx:393-413`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether any platform-specific installer detection exists outside the audited files. I did not find one with repo search.

### Per-app directory mapping

- The core per-kind mapping is `UIKindMap` in `src/store/models.py:130-136`.
- Known UI names are declared in `UIConfig.known` at `src/store/models.py:139-142`.
- Default maps for all four named UIs exist at `src/store/models.py:144-196`.
- ComfyUI maps to:
  - checkpoints: `models/checkpoints`
  - loras: `models/loras`
  - vae: `models/vae`
  - embeddings: `models/embeddings`
  - controlnet: `models/controlnet`
  - upscale_models: `models/upscale_models`
  - clip: `models/clip`
  - text_encoders: `models/text_encoders`
  - diffusion_models: `models/diffusion_models`
  - unet: `models/unet`
- Forge maps to A1111-style folders at `src/store/models.py:160-171`.
- A1111 maps to the same folder style at `src/store/models.py:172-183`.
- SD.Next maps to the same folder style at `src/store/models.py:184-195`.
- `UISets.create_default()` includes `local`, `comfy_only`, `all`, and singleton sets at `src/store/models.py:321-343`.
- The default `local` UI set is only `["comfyui", "forge"]` at `src/store/models.py:331-336`.
- `config/settings.py` has a separate `StoreSettings.ui_sets` default without `comfy_only` at `config/settings.py:127-142`.
- Store runtime targets come from store state `ui_sets.json`, not the app settings object, via `src/store/__init__.py:307-321`.
- This means app settings UI-set config and store `state/ui_sets.json` can diverge.
- `AssetKind.CUSTOM_NODE` exists at `src/store/models.py:55`.
- `UIKindMap` has no `custom_node` field at `src/store/models.py:119-136`.
- `ViewBuilder` falls back to `models/custom_node` when a kind path is missing at `src/store/view_builder.py:85-89`.
- `UIAttacher` skips kinds whose map returns no path at `src/store/ui_attach.py:332-336`.
- Result: custom-node assets can be placed into Synapse views but are not attached into UI installs by `UIAttacher`.
- Workflows are not part of Profile view mapping.
- Workflow symlinks use separate ComfyUI-only endpoints at `src/store/api.py:4568-4621`.

### Symlink lifecycle

- Synapse view directories live under `data/views/<ui>/profiles/<profile>` via `StoreLayout` paths at `src/store/layout.py:209-223`.
- `ViewBuilder.build()` computes a plan, builds a staging directory, then renames into the final view path at `src/store/view_builder.py:278-348`.
- View symlinks point from the view tree into the blob store at `src/store/view_builder.py:318-327`.
- Existing final profile views are renamed to `.old`, replaced, then deleted at `src/store/view_builder.py:329-337`.
- `ViewBuilder.activate()` writes an `active` symlink to `profiles/<profile>` at `src/store/view_builder.py:375-409`.
- `create_symlink()` uses symlinks on Linux/macOS at `src/store/view_builder.py:171-173`.
- On Windows, `create_symlink()` falls back from symlink to hardlink to copy at `src/store/view_builder.py:154-170`.
- `ViewBuilder.remove_profile_view()` can remove one profile view at `src/store/view_builder.py:454-465`.
- `ViewBuilder.clean_orphaned_views()` can delete view directories whose profile no longer exists at `src/store/view_builder.py:467-486`.
- I did not find `clean_orphaned_views()` wired into delete/reset/doctor/attach flows.
- `Store.delete_pack()` deletes the work profile and removes it from runtime stacks, but does not call view cleanup in the shown code at `src/store/__init__.py:370-443`.
- UI app attachment is implemented separately in `src/store/ui_attach.py`.
- For ComfyUI, preferred attachment writes/patches `extra_model_paths.yaml` at `src/store/ui_attach.py:158-234`.
- ComfyUI YAML attachment creates a backup once at `src/store/ui_attach.py:204-210`.
- ComfyUI detach restores that backup or removes the `synapse` section at `src/store/ui_attach.py:236-279`.
- For Forge/A1111/SD.Next, attachment creates `<ui_root>/<kind_path>/synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:285-378`.
- Detach removes those `synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:405-452`.
- Attach status checks ComfyUI YAML and per-kind `synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:454-536`.
- `refresh_attached()` only refreshes UIs that already report attached at `src/store/ui_attach.py:538-584`.
- `Store.use()` calls `refresh_attached_uis()` after successful sync at `src/store/__init__.py:680-688`.
- `Store.back()` calls `refresh_attached_uis()` after successful sync at `src/store/__init__.py:712-720`.
- `Store.sync()` does not call `refresh_attached_uis()` at `src/store/__init__.py:626-652`.
- `Store.reset()` does not call `refresh_attached_uis()` after sync at `src/store/__init__.py:772-785`.
- `UpdateService._sync_after_update()` rebuilds views but does not refresh attached UI roots at `src/store/update_service.py:621-642`.

### Reaction to model updates

- The update plan explicitly expects views to rebuild when update sync is true in `plans/PLAN-Updates.md:118-143`.
- Backend `UpdateService.update_pack()` only syncs if `sync=True` and `ui_targets` are passed at `src/store/update_service.py:506-508`.
- `_sync_after_update()` downloads missing blobs and rebuilds active views for target UIs at `src/store/update_service.py:602-648`.
- The CLI `synapse update` defaults `--sync` to true at `src/store/cli.py:792-800`.
- Store facade maps update sync to default UI targets at `src/store/__init__.py:838-848`.
- The web updates store intentionally sends `sync: false` at `apps/web/src/stores/updatesStore.ts:293-307`.
- The web then queues downloads through `/api/packs/{pack}/download-asset` at `apps/web/src/stores/updatesStore.ts:315-321`.
- The plan says this was intentional because web downloads should use the Downloads tab, not `_sync_after_update()` at `plans/PLAN-Updates.md:886-921`.
- The `download-asset` endpoint downloads a blob and updates the lock at `src/store/api.py:2649-2715`.
- `download-asset` does not rebuild Profile views after updating the lock.
- `download-asset` creates a direct symlink into ComfyUI’s configured model folder at `src/store/api.py:2677-2707`.
- That direct symlink path is outside the Profiles view/attach system.
- This is a major integration inconsistency with the stated Profiles-as-app-connection model.
- Inventory has a Doctor action that posts `rebuild_views: true` to `/api/store/doctor` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/inventory/InventoryPage.tsx:409-415`.
- Doctor can rebuild active views at `src/store/__init__.py:986-1030`.
- Doctor also does not refresh already-attached UI roots after rebuilding views.
- Result: model updates can relink CLI Profile views when sync is used, but web update downloads do not automatically relink Profile views.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether another frontend polling effect calls Profile sync/doctor after update downloads complete. The audited update/download hooks only invalidate pack/backup queries at `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackDownloads.ts:177-180`.

### Conflict handling

- Internal Profile view conflicts are resolved by destination path.
- `ViewPlan.add_entry()` detects duplicate `dst_relpath` at `src/store/view_builder.py:91-112`.
- Later profile packs replace earlier entries, so last pack wins.
- `ShadowedEntry` records winner and loser pack names at `src/store/view_builder.py:95-100`.
- `ProfileService.ensure_work_profile()` deliberately puts the used pack at the end so it wins conflicts at `src/store/profile_service.py:134-140`.
- `ConflictMode` includes `LAST_WINS`, `FIRST_WINS`, and `STRICT` at `src/store/models.py:68-72`.
- `Profile.conflicts` exists at `src/store/models.py:1017-1022`.
- `ViewBuilder` imports `ConflictMode` at `src/store/view_builder.py:29-38`.
- `ViewBuilder` does not actually branch on `profile.conflicts.mode`.
- Therefore `FIRST_WINS` and `STRICT` are modeled but not implemented in view planning.
- Conflict info is returned in `UseResult.shadowed` after `use()` builds views at `src/store/profile_service.py:240-246`.
- Store status currently returns an empty `shadowed` list and says accurate info would require computing a view plan at `src/store/__init__.py:951-960`.
- Profiles status reads shadowed entries from `store.status()` at `src/store/api.py:5039-5059`.
- Therefore `ProfilesPage` has a shadowed table, but it will normally show none unless `store.status()` is expanded.
- For UI installation conflicts:
  - A1111/Forge/SD.Next attach into a `synapse` subfolder, so root-level same filenames are not directly detected.
  - `UIAttacher.attach()` refuses to overwrite an existing real `synapse` path at `src/store/ui_attach.py:351-363`.
  - ComfyUI YAML exposes direct kind paths and has no filename conflict detection against existing ComfyUI roots at `src/store/ui_attach.py:121-140`.
  - `download-asset` can unlink an existing ComfyUI target path before making a symlink at `src/store/api.py:2702-2707`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: how ComfyUI resolves duplicate filenames across `extra_model_paths.yaml` and native model folders.

### UI in ProfilesPage

- `ProfilesPage` fetches `/api/profiles/status` every 5 seconds at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:40-49`.
- It shows one card per UI runtime status at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:140-217`.
- It shows active profile name per UI at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:153-161`.
- It shows Back and Reset only when active profile is not `global` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:164-184`.
- Back posts `{ ui_set: ui, sync: true }` to `/api/profiles/back` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:51-60`.
- Reset posts `{ ui_set: ui, sync: true }` to `/api/profiles/reset` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:71-80`.
- Singleton UI sets exist, so passing `ui_set: "comfyui"` works when `state/ui_sets.json` contains those singleton sets at `src/store/models.py:337-341`.
- It visualizes the per-UI stack at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:195-214`.
- It has a shadowed files table at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:226-260`.
- It has an updates badge area at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:263-279`.
- It does not show app root paths.
- It does not show attach/detach status.
- It does not expose Attach, Detach, Sync, Doctor, or Connect actions.
- It does not show missing blobs, backup-only blobs, or restore progress.
- It does not let the user activate/use a pack.
- It does not let the user choose or edit UI sets.
- It does not show whether ComfyUI needs YAML restart/reload.
- It does not show whether a model is actually visible to the target UI.

### Backup integration

- `Store` constructs `BackupService` and injects it into `ProfileService` at `src/store/__init__.py:255-267`.
- `ProfileService._install_missing_blobs()` tries backup first when a blob is missing locally at `src/store/profile_service.py:493-539`.
- It checks backup connection at `src/store/profile_service.py:519-521`.
- It calls `restore_blob()` if the blob exists on backup at `src/store/profile_service.py:522-526`.
- It falls back to `blob_store.download()` from the first lock URL at `src/store/profile_service.py:530-535`.
- `use()` calls `_install_missing_blobs()` before building views at `src/store/profile_service.py:231-239`.
- `sync_profile()` calls `_install_missing_blobs()` when `install_missing=True` at `src/store/profile_service.py:386-397`.
- `back(sync=True)` does not call `_install_missing_blobs()` before rebuilding the previous profile at `src/store/profile_service.py:332-342`.
- Restore failures and download failures are swallowed at `src/store/profile_service.py:527-537`.
- The user gets only a note like `restored_N_blobs_from_backup` at `src/store/profile_service.py:235-239`.
- Inventory plan explicitly documents auto-restore on use as completed at `plans/PLAN-Model-Inventory.md:3401-3410`.
- Backup tests cover auto-restore on use at `tests/store/test_backup.py:643-680`.

## 2. SPECIFICATION GAPS

- No clear specification says whether UI installation discovery is required or manual path entry is sufficient.
- No clear specification says whether Profiles should auto-attach a UI after first successful `use`.
- No clear specification says when a user should run Attach versus Use versus Sync.
- No clear specification says whether default UI target should be `local`, `all`, or detected installed UIs.
- No clear specification resolves the two UI-set sources of truth:
  - store state `state/ui_sets.json`
  - app config `config.settings.StoreSettings.ui_sets`
- No clear specification resolves the two default UI-set sources:
  - `StoreConfig.defaults.ui_set`
  - `config.settings.StoreSettings.default_ui_set`
- No clear specification says whether Settings edits should mutate `state/config.json` and `state/ui_sets.json`.
- No clear specification says how Profiles should represent ComfyUI YAML state.
- No clear specification says whether ComfyUI attachment should require restart, reload, or no action.
- No clear specification defines conflict behavior when a Synapse-exposed filename matches a model already installed in a UI.
- No clear specification defines whether UI-native files should be shadowed, preserved, warned, hidden, or indexed.
- No clear specification says whether A1111/Forge/SD.Next should use `synapse/` subfolders or root-level exposure.
- No clear specification says whether `synapse/filename.safetensors` paths are acceptable for workflows and generation metadata.
- No clear specification says how SD.Next’s actual folder conventions differ from A1111/Forge.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: SD.Next may not be fully equivalent to A1111 path mapping.
- No clear specification says how Flux/SD3-era model kinds should map for each UI.
- No clear specification says how `CUSTOM_NODE` dependencies should connect to ComfyUI.
- No clear specification says whether workflow files are part of Profiles or separate pack artifacts.
- No clear specification says whether workflow symlinks should be governed by active profile.
- No clear specification says whether workflow symlinks should be created only for packs in the active profile.
- No clear specification says whether app connection should include UI health checks in ProfilesPage.
- No clear specification says whether auto-restore from backup should be silent or user-confirmed.
- No clear specification says whether backup restore must check available disk space before restoring during `use`.
- Inventory plan describes a confirmation dialog for restore, but code silently restores.
- No clear specification says whether `back(sync=True)` should auto-restore missing blobs for the previous profile.
- No clear specification says what happens if some target UIs sync successfully and others fail.
- No clear specification says whether `UseResult` should return attach refresh failures.
- No clear specification says whether `Store.use(sync=False)` should update runtime without ensuring the view exists.
- No clear specification says whether active UI symlinks should ever point to the stable `active` symlink instead of resolved profile paths.
- No clear specification says whether stale UI attach symlinks should be repaired by Doctor.
- No clear specification says whether orphaned Profile views should be cleaned automatically.
- No clear specification says how Profile deletion should affect built views and UI attachments.
- No clear specification says how strict conflict mode should surface in API/UI.
- No clear specification says whether multiple active profiles across UIs are supported UX or internal-only behavior.
- No clear specification says whether ProfilesPage should show per-UI missing blobs and unresolved dependencies.
- No clear specification says how Updates should trigger Profile view rebuilds in the web flow.
- No clear specification says whether `download-asset` should remain allowed to create direct ComfyUI symlinks.
- No clear specification says how Custom Pack creation should add packs to global/work profiles.
- No clear specification says whether imported workflow packs should auto-use, auto-sync, or only create pack state.
- No clear specification says what “connected” means for A1111/Forge/SD.Next beyond filesystem symlinks.
- No clear specification says whether external UI process APIs should be called to refresh model lists.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether any of the target UIs can detect symlink changes without restart/rescan.

## 3. IMPLEMENTATION HOLES

### Cross-cutting Profile holes

- `Profile.conflicts.mode` is modeled but ignored by `ViewBuilder`; all conflicts are last-wins.
- `StatusReport.shadowed` is always empty from `Store.status()` at `src/store/__init__.py:951-960`.
- `ProfilesPage` has a shadowed table that is currently starved by that empty status.
- `ProfilePackEntry.enabled` is shown in CLI at `src/store/cli.py:524-528`, but `ViewBuilder.compute_plan()` does not check `pack_entry.enabled` at `src/store/view_builder.py:236-270`.
- `ProfileService._load_packs_for_profile()` swallows all pack load errors at `src/store/profile_service.py:483-490`.
- `ProfileService._install_missing_blobs()` swallows restore/download errors at `src/store/profile_service.py:522-537`.
- `UseResult` does not include build report errors, missing blob counts, or attach refresh results.
- `sync_profile()` returns build reports but Store/API reduce them to counts and errors only at `src/store/api.py:5098-5119`.
- `Store.sync()` does not refresh already-attached UIs after rebuilding views.
- `Store.reset(sync=True)` calls `sync()` but does not refresh already-attached UIs.
- `UpdateService._sync_after_update()` rebuilds views but does not refresh already-attached UIs.
- `ViewBuilder.clean_orphaned_views()` exists but is not wired into store operations.
- `delete_pack()` removes work profiles and runtime references but does not clean built view folders.
- `use(sync=False)` pushes runtime stack without building or activating a view.
- `back(sync=False)` tries activation and suppresses any failure at `src/store/profile_service.py:343-349`.

### ComfyUI holes

- ComfyUI path detection is only `Path.exists()` against `config.comfyui.base_path` at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:89-91`.
- ComfyUI attach via YAML only includes kinds with existing view folders at `src/store/ui_attach.py:123-136`.
- ComfyUI YAML does not include `base_path`; it writes absolute paths per kind at `src/store/ui_attach.py:138-140`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether this YAML shape is accepted by all supported ComfyUI versions.
- ComfyUI custom nodes are not attached through Profiles.
- ComfyUI workflows are managed through separate ComfyUI-specific endpoints, not Profiles.
- Direct `download-asset` symlinks into ComfyUI bypass Profiles at `src/store/api.py:2677-2707`.
- Direct `download-asset` can remove an existing ComfyUI file/symlink at `src/store/api.py:2702-2707`.
- ComfyUI attach status does not validate whether YAML paths still point to the current active profile contents.
- ComfyUI attach status only checks whether `synapse` exists in YAML at `src/store/ui_attach.py:499-508`.

### Forge holes

- Forge folder maps exist at `src/store/models.py:160-171`.
- Forge installation detection is only configured-root existence via `UIAttacher.status()`.
- Forge attachment uses `models/<kind>/synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:345-367`.
- Existing root-level Forge model filename conflicts are not detected.
- Existing non-symlink `synapse` folders are reported as errors, but no migration path exists.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether Forge sees models inside `models/Lora/synapse` with expected names in all workflows.

### A1111 holes

- A1111 folder maps exist at `src/store/models.py:172-183`.
- A1111 is not part of default `local` UI set at `src/store/models.py:331-336`.
- A1111 installation detection is only configured-root existence.
- Existing A1111 root-level model filename conflicts are not detected.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether A1111 model scanning behaves correctly with nested `synapse` subfolders for every mapped kind.

### SD.Next holes

- SD.Next folder maps exist at `src/store/models.py:184-195`.
- SD.Next is not part of default `local` UI set at `src/store/models.py:331-336`.
- SD.Next installation detection is only configured-root existence.
- SD.Next mapping duplicates A1111/Forge mapping.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether SD.Next actually uses all listed A1111-compatible paths.
- Existing SD.Next root-level model filename conflicts are not detected.

### Settings/config holes

- Settings saves `store_ui_roots` to app config at `apps/web/src/components/modules/SettingsPage.tsx:168-177`.
- Backend writes those roots to `config.settings` at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:247-253`.
- Store UI targets still come from `state/ui_sets.json` at `src/store/__init__.py:307-321`.
- Settings default UI-set changes do not obviously mutate `state/config.json` defaults.
- Settings UI sets do not obviously mutate `state/ui_sets.json`.
- `UIAttacher` is cached in `Store._get_ui_attacher()` at `src/store/__init__.py:1053-1087`.
- Store singleton is reset when UI roots change at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:263-265`.
- Store singleton is not reset when only `store_default_ui_set` or `store_ui_sets` change at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:255-259`.
- Because store target resolution uses state files, this may not matter for targets, but it confirms the source-of-truth split.

### API/CLI holes

- API has store-level attach/detach/status endpoints at `src/store/api.py:446-478`.
- Profiles API does not expose attach/detach/status.
- Profiles API `reset` returns legacy `ui_results` but drops `ResetResult.notes` at `src/store/api.py:5122-5151`.
- CLI exposes `use`, `back`, `reset`, `profiles list`, `profiles show`, `status`, `attach`, `detach`, `attach-status`, `sync` at `src/store/cli.py:390-685` and `src/store/cli.py:965-985`.
- CLI `sync` appears to call `store.sync(profile_name=profile, ui_set=ui_set)` even when `profile` is `None` at `src/store/cli.py:965-974`; `Store.sync()` requires a string profile name.
- CLI `update` output treats `result.applied` as iterable length at `src/store/cli.py:813-818`; `UpdateResult.applied` is a bool at `src/store/models.py:1195-1205`.
- These CLI issues are adjacent but affect end-to-end Profile operations.

### Custom Pack holes

- Custom pack API creates a pack at `src/store/api.py:3275-3345`.
- It does not add the new pack to global profile.
- It does not sync any Profile views.
- It does not attach or refresh any UI.
- It calls `store.layout.pack_path()` at `src/store/api.py:3334`.
- `StoreLayout` defines `pack_dir()`, not `pack_path()`, in audited code at `src/store/layout.py:169-179`.
- That suggests custom pack creation may currently fail unless `pack_path` is provided elsewhere. NEEDS VERIFICATION.

### Workflow holes

- Workflows are stored under pack workflows paths at `src/store/layout.py:189-191`.
- Pack detail builds workflow symlink status against ComfyUI paths only at `src/store/api.py:1763-1837`.
- Workflow symlink creation writes into ComfyUI user workflow folder at `src/store/api.py:4568-4621`.
- Workflow UI labels this as ComfyUI workflow management at `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackWorkflowsSection.tsx:1-15`.
- Workflow links are not scoped to active Profile.
- Workflow links are not managed by `ViewBuilder`.
- Workflow links are not available for A1111/Forge/SD.Next.
- Workflow delete removes ComfyUI symlink variants at `src/store/api.py:4725-4737`.

## 4. INTEGRATION GAPS

### Profiles vs Updates

- CLI update can rebuild Profile views through `_sync_after_update()`.
- Web update intentionally does not call update sync.
- Web update queues downloads through `download-asset`.
- `download-asset` updates lock state but does not rebuild Profile views.
- `download-asset` creates direct ComfyUI symlinks outside Profiles.
- Therefore a web-updated model can exist in blob store and ComfyUI direct symlink but not in Profile views until Doctor/Sync runs.
- `ProfilesPage` update badge depends on `_cached_updates_count` at `src/store/api.py:5052-5059`.
- I did not find `_cached_updates_count` set in the update store flow except API-side search result at `src/store/api.py:5240` from grep context. NEEDS VERIFICATION.
- Update impact plans mention impacted packs, but Profile stacks do not surface impacted active profiles.
- Update sync does not refresh UI attachment paths.
- If UI symlinks point to resolved active profile dirs, a rebuilt active profile may require refresh.

### Profiles vs Inventory

- Inventory plan models `active_in_uis` at `plans/PLAN-Model-Inventory.md:280-296`.
- Profiles runtime has active profile per UI at `src/store/models.py:1058-1103`.
- Store status can detect missing blobs for active profile at `src/store/__init__.py:913-947`.
- Inventory Quick Action can run Doctor rebuild views at `apps/web/src/components/modules/inventory/InventoryPage.tsx:409-415`.
- Doctor rebuilds views but does not refresh attached UI roots.
- Inventory backup-only restore integrates into `use()` and `sync_profile()`.
- Inventory UI is likely where backup restore is visible, but ProfilesPage does not expose backup-only state.
- Diagnostics TODO in inventory plan says Settings diagnostics should move to Profiles and validate all UI paths at `plans/PLAN-Model-Inventory.md:3998-4015`.
- That has not happened in `ProfilesPage`.

### Profiles vs Custom Pack

- Custom pack creation creates pack metadata only.
- It does not add to global profile.
- It does not create or update a work profile.
- It does not call Profile sync.
- It does not provide a “use this pack now” flow.
- It may call a nonexistent `StoreLayout.pack_path()` method. NEEDS VERIFICATION.
- If custom packs contain local-file dependencies, Profile view exposure depends on lock resolution and blob adoption, not custom pack creation itself.
- There is no ProfilesPage action to add/remove custom packs from global profile.
- There is no ProfilesPage indication that a custom pack exists but is not in any active profile.

### Profiles vs Workflow Wizard

- Workflow import in `ImportModal` posts workflow JSON to `/api/packs/import` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ImportModal.tsx:61-83`.
- Workflow import invalidates packs only at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ImportModal.tsx:84-92`.
- It does not call `use`, `sync`, `attach`, or workflow symlink creation.
- Workflow symlink management is per-pack and ComfyUI-only.
- Workflows are not activated/deactivated with Profile stack changes.
- If a user switches Profiles, existing ComfyUI workflow symlinks remain until manually removed.
- Workflow dependencies may be in packs, but workflow file exposure is separate from model view exposure.
- There is no “active Profile workflows” concept in code.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether workflow-scanned packs are automatically added to global profile by the import endpoint.

## 5. TESTS

### Existing lower-level coverage

- `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py` covers `ViewBuilder.compute_plan()` empty profile at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:21-42`.
- It covers one-pack planning at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:43-114`.
- It covers last-wins conflict planning at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:116-195`.
- It covers view build symlink creation at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:197-268`.
- It covers active profile symlink creation at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:270-294`.
- It covers `get_active_profile()` at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:296-315`.
- It covers Profile global loading at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:322-331`.
- It covers adding a pack to global at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:333-357`.
- It covers work profile naming at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:359-371`.
- It covers work profile creation at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:373-400`.
- It covers `ProfileService.use(sync=False)` stack update at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:402-436`.
- It covers `ProfileService.back(sync=False)` at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:438-468`.
- It covers `back` at base at `tests/store/test_views_profiles.py:478-485`.

### Existing UIAttacher coverage

- `tests/store/test_api_critical.py` covers basic attach symlink creation at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:21-88`.
- It covers detach removing symlinks at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:90-111`.
- It covers attach status before/after attach at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:113-133`.
- It covers nonexistent UI root failure at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:135-145`.
- It covers Forge kind mapping at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:156-167`.
- It covers ComfyUI YAML generation at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:314-371`.
- It covers ComfyUI YAML attach at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:373-401`.
- It covers ComfyUI `use_yaml=True` at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:403-418`.
- It covers ComfyUI YAML backup/restore at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:420-457`.
- It covers refresh preserving backup at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:696-746`.
- It covers refresh-only-attached behavior at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:748-783`.
- It covers attach/detach/reattach cycle at `tests/store/test_api_critical.py:785-840`.

### Existing API/e2e coverage

- E2E API contract checks `/api/store/status` shape at `tests/e2e/test_core_workflows.py:431-446`.
- E2E API contract checks `/api/profiles/status` shape at `tests/e2e/test_core_workflows.py:452-465`.
- E2E use result shape exists around `tests/e2e/test_core_workflows.py:867-905`.
- Backup auto-restore on use is tested at `tests/store/test_backup.py:643-680`.
- Backup fallback/no-backup use flows are tested at `tests/store/test_backup.py:682-726`.

### Real-world flows not tested

- No test covers installed-UI discovery because no discovery exists.
- No test covers Settings UI roots saving through `/api/system/settings` and then attaching with those roots.
- No test covers divergence between app config UI sets and store `state/ui_sets.json`.
- No test covers Profile sync followed by UI attachment refresh.
- No test covers `Store.sync()` with already-attached ComfyUI/Forge roots.
- No test covers `Store.reset(sync=True)` refreshing UI attachment.
- No test covers update web flow: apply lock, queue download, complete download, rebuild Profile view.
- No test covers `download-asset` conflicting with the Profiles connection model.
- No test covers `download-asset` unlinking an existing real ComfyUI model file.
- No test covers ComfyUI YAML duplicate filename behavior.
- No test covers A1111 existing model conflict behavior.
- No test covers Forge existing model conflict behavior.
- No test covers SD.Next existing model conflict behavior.
- No test covers strict or first-wins conflict mode.
- No test covers disabled `ProfilePackEntry.enabled`.
- No test covers orphaned Profile view cleanup.
- No test covers deleting a pack and then cleaning `data/views/<ui>/profiles/work__Pack`.
- No test covers custom-node Profile exposure.
- No test covers workflow symlinks being scoped to active profile.
- No test covers back/sync auto-restore from backup.
- No test covers partial UI failure during multi-UI `use`.
- No test covers Windows symlink fallback behavior.
- No test covers filesystem permission failures for ComfyUI YAML patching.
- No test covers invalid YAML in existing `extra_model_paths.yaml`.
- No test covers UIAttacher status detecting stale paths after active profile changes.
- No test covers ProfilesPage user flow from disconnected UI to connected UI.
- No test covers full flow: install ComfyUI -> configure path -> attach -> use pack -> model appears.
- No Playwright/browser test appears to validate ProfilesPage UX or Settings app-path UX.

## 6. UX HOLES

- A user can configure UI paths in Settings, but ProfilesPage does not show those paths.
- A user can see active profile stacks, but not whether any UI is attached.
- A user can click Back/Reset, but cannot click Attach/Detach from ProfilesPage.
- A user cannot tell from ProfilesPage whether ComfyUI, Forge, A1111, or SD.Next is installed.
- Settings diagnostics only directly validates ComfyUI.
- Forge/A1111/SD.Next path errors are not first-class in Settings diagnostics.
- A user cannot tell whether the default UI set includes their target UI.
- A user may set A1111 path but default `local` only targets ComfyUI and Forge.
- Settings default UI set may not affect store runtime target resolution because store uses `state/ui_sets.json`.
- A user may not understand that “use pack” and “attach UI” are separate operations.
- A user may import/download a pack and expect it to appear in ComfyUI immediately.
- If the UI is not attached, `use()` builds Synapse views but does not connect the UI.
- If the UI is attached but stale, some operations rebuild views without refresh.
- A user has no direct “Connect this UI” path from ProfilesPage.
- A user has no “test model visibility” confirmation.
- A user has no “open this target folder” or “copy current active view path” affordance.
- A user has no visibility into `extra_model_paths.yaml` patch status from ProfilesPage.
- A user has no prompt to restart/rescan target UI after attach.
- A user has no warning that A1111/Forge/SD.Next models are exposed under a `synapse` subfolder.
- A user has no UI-native conflict warning.
- A user has no warning if ComfyUI already has a model with the same filename.
- A user has no warning that web updates may need view rebuild/doctor to reflect Profile views.
- A user has no ProfilesPage restore progress when backup-only blobs are auto-restored.
- Silent backup restore may look like `use()` is hanging for large files.
- Failure to restore or download missing blobs can be swallowed, leaving only missing view entries.
- ProfilesPage does not show missing blob count.
- ProfilesPage does not show build errors.
- ProfilesPage does not show unresolved dependencies.
- ProfilesPage does not show attached app health.
- ProfilesPage does not show “last synced” or “view built” state.
- ProfilesPage does not show stale orphaned views.
- Custom packs can be created without obvious “add to active Profile” next step.
- Workflow imports can create packs/workflows without obvious “activate dependencies in Profile” next step.
- Workflow symlink controls live in pack detail, not Profiles, so workflow app connection is split from model app connection.
- The phrase “Profiles” in UI currently means stack management more than end-to-end app connection.

## 7. OPEN QUESTIONS

- Should ProfilesPage become the canonical UI connection dashboard?
- Should Attach/Detach/Attach Status move from store-level UI into ProfilesPage?
- Should `/api/profiles/status` include attach status for every UI?
- Should `/api/profiles/status` include configured root path and existence for every UI?
- Should UI installation detection remain path-exists only, or should Synapse scan common locations?
- Should default UI targets be configured in store state, app config, or one unified source?
- Should Settings write `state/config.json` and `state/ui_sets.json` for Profile defaults?
- Should `local` default include A1111 and SD.Next when their roots exist?
- Should `use(pack)` auto-attach a UI if the UI is configured but detached?
- Should `use(pack)` fail, warn, or continue when no target UI is attached?
- Should `sync(profile)` refresh attached UIs automatically?
- Should `reset(sync=True)` refresh attached UIs automatically?
- Should update downloads trigger Profile view rebuild after completion?
- Should `download-asset` stop creating direct ComfyUI symlinks?
- Should all app connection go through Profile views only?
- Should ComfyUI use absolute per-kind YAML paths or a `base_path` style YAML?
- Should A1111/Forge/SD.Next symlinks point to the stable `views/<ui>/active/...` path instead of resolved profile dirs?
- Should `UIAttacher` ever overwrite existing `synapse` real directories?
- What should happen when a UI already has a model with the same filename?
- Should Profile conflict mode support `first_wins` and `strict`, or should the model be simplified to last-wins only?
- Should `ProfilePackEntry.enabled` affect view building?
- Should custom nodes be managed by Profiles?
- Should workflows be scoped by active Profile?
- Should workflow symlinks be removed when a pack leaves the active Profile?
- Should non-Comfy workflow targets exist for A1111/Forge/SD.Next, or are workflows ComfyUI-only?
- Should backup auto-restore during `use` be silent or confirmed by the user?
- Should backup restore check disk space before copying?
- Should `back(sync=True)` restore missing blobs for the target profile?
- Should build errors and missing blobs be hard failures for `use`, or warnings?
- Should `UseResult` expose per-UI build and attach-refresh results?
- Should Doctor clean orphaned Profile views by default?
- Should deleting a pack remove its built view directories?
- Should ProfilesPage show a “model should now appear in ComfyUI as X” confirmation?
- Should Profile status compute shadowed entries live, cache them, or persist build reports?
- Should SD.Next mapping be separately verified and adjusted instead of sharing A1111 paths?
- Should Forge mapping be separately verified for all current asset kinds?
- Should Windows copy fallback be allowed, given it breaks content-addressed live-link semantics?
- Should app connection support an explicit “rescan UI models” command per UI where available?
tokens used
244,847
# Profiles App-Connection Audit

## 1. WHAT EXISTS TODAY

### Detection of installed UIs

- There is no real discovery/scanning system for installed UIs.
- UI roots are configured, not detected.
- Default roots are hardcoded in `config/settings.py:101-124`:
  - `comfyui` -> `~/ComfyUI`
  - `forge` -> `~/stable-diffusion-webui-forge`
  - `a1111` -> `~/stable-diffusion-webui`
  - `sdnext` -> `~/sdnext`
- API store creation passes app config into the store singleton for UI roots at `src/store/api.py:312-345`.
- `UIAttacher.status()` checks whether a configured root exists at `src/store/ui_attach.py:479-486`.
- `UIAttacher.attach()` also checks whether the configured root exists before attaching at `src/store/ui_attach.py:307-327`.
- `/api/system/status` only checks ComfyUI existence, not Forge/A1111/SD.Next, at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:84-117`.
- `/api/system/diagnostics` also only has a direct ComfyUI path check at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:128-136`.
- `/api/system/diagnostics` includes `store.get_attach_status()` at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:183-184`, but that is attachment status for configured UI targets, not installed-UI discovery.
- Settings exposes manual UI roots in the frontend at `apps/web/src/components/modules/SettingsPage.tsx:55-63`.
- Settings renders editable UI root inputs at `apps/web/src/components/modules/SettingsPage.tsx:393-413`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether any platform-specific installer detection exists outside the audited files. I did not find one with repo search.

### Per-app directory mapping

- The core per-kind mapping is `UIKindMap` in `src/store/models.py:130-136`.
- Known UI names are declared in `UIConfig.known` at `src/store/models.py:139-142`.
- Default maps for all four named UIs exist at `src/store/models.py:144-196`.
- ComfyUI maps to:
  - checkpoints: `models/checkpoints`
  - loras: `models/loras`
  - vae: `models/vae`
  - embeddings: `models/embeddings`
  - controlnet: `models/controlnet`
  - upscale_models: `models/upscale_models`
  - clip: `models/clip`
  - text_encoders: `models/text_encoders`
  - diffusion_models: `models/diffusion_models`
  - unet: `models/unet`
- Forge maps to A1111-style folders at `src/store/models.py:160-171`.
- A1111 maps to the same folder style at `src/store/models.py:172-183`.
- SD.Next maps to the same folder style at `src/store/models.py:184-195`.
- `UISets.create_default()` includes `local`, `comfy_only`, `all`, and singleton sets at `src/store/models.py:321-343`.
- The default `local` UI set is only `["comfyui", "forge"]` at `src/store/models.py:331-336`.
- `config/settings.py` has a separate `StoreSettings.ui_sets` default without `comfy_only` at `config/settings.py:127-142`.
- Store runtime targets come from store state `ui_sets.json`, not the app settings object, via `src/store/__init__.py:307-321`.
- This means app settings UI-set config and store `state/ui_sets.json` can diverge.
- `AssetKind.CUSTOM_NODE` exists at `src/store/models.py:55`.
- `UIKindMap` has no `custom_node` field at `src/store/models.py:119-136`.
- `ViewBuilder` falls back to `models/custom_node` when a kind path is missing at `src/store/view_builder.py:85-89`.
- `UIAttacher` skips kinds whose map returns no path at `src/store/ui_attach.py:332-336`.
- Result: custom-node assets can be placed into Synapse views but are not attached into UI installs by `UIAttacher`.
- Workflows are not part of Profile view mapping.
- Workflow symlinks use separate ComfyUI-only endpoints at `src/store/api.py:4568-4621`.

### Symlink lifecycle

- Synapse view directories live under `data/views/<ui>/profiles/<profile>` via `StoreLayout` paths at `src/store/layout.py:209-223`.
- `ViewBuilder.build()` computes a plan, builds a staging directory, then renames into the final view path at `src/store/view_builder.py:278-348`.
- View symlinks point from the view tree into the blob store at `src/store/view_builder.py:318-327`.
- Existing final profile views are renamed to `.old`, replaced, then deleted at `src/store/view_builder.py:329-337`.
- `ViewBuilder.activate()` writes an `active` symlink to `profiles/<profile>` at `src/store/view_builder.py:375-409`.
- `create_symlink()` uses symlinks on Linux/macOS at `src/store/view_builder.py:171-173`.
- On Windows, `create_symlink()` falls back from symlink to hardlink to copy at `src/store/view_builder.py:154-170`.
- `ViewBuilder.remove_profile_view()` can remove one profile view at `src/store/view_builder.py:454-465`.
- `ViewBuilder.clean_orphaned_views()` can delete view directories whose profile no longer exists at `src/store/view_builder.py:467-486`.
- I did not find `clean_orphaned_views()` wired into delete/reset/doctor/attach flows.
- `Store.delete_pack()` deletes the work profile and removes it from runtime stacks, but does not call view cleanup in the shown code at `src/store/__init__.py:370-443`.
- UI app attachment is implemented separately in `src/store/ui_attach.py`.
- For ComfyUI, preferred attachment writes/patches `extra_model_paths.yaml` at `src/store/ui_attach.py:158-234`.
- ComfyUI YAML attachment creates a backup once at `src/store/ui_attach.py:204-210`.
- ComfyUI detach restores that backup or removes the `synapse` section at `src/store/ui_attach.py:236-279`.
- For Forge/A1111/SD.Next, attachment creates `<ui_root>/<kind_path>/synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:285-378`.
- Detach removes those `synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:405-452`.
- Attach status checks ComfyUI YAML and per-kind `synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:454-536`.
- `refresh_attached()` only refreshes UIs that already report attached at `src/store/ui_attach.py:538-584`.
- `Store.use()` calls `refresh_attached_uis()` after successful sync at `src/store/__init__.py:680-688`.
- `Store.back()` calls `refresh_attached_uis()` after successful sync at `src/store/__init__.py:712-720`.
- `Store.sync()` does not call `refresh_attached_uis()` at `src/store/__init__.py:626-652`.
- `Store.reset()` does not call `refresh_attached_uis()` after sync at `src/store/__init__.py:772-785`.
- `UpdateService._sync_after_update()` rebuilds views but does not refresh attached UI roots at `src/store/update_service.py:621-642`.

### Reaction to model updates

- The update plan explicitly expects views to rebuild when update sync is true in `plans/PLAN-Updates.md:118-143`.
- Backend `UpdateService.update_pack()` only syncs if `sync=True` and `ui_targets` are passed at `src/store/update_service.py:506-508`.
- `_sync_after_update()` downloads missing blobs and rebuilds active views for target UIs at `src/store/update_service.py:602-648`.
- The CLI `synapse update` defaults `--sync` to true at `src/store/cli.py:792-800`.
- Store facade maps update sync to default UI targets at `src/store/__init__.py:838-848`.
- The web updates store intentionally sends `sync: false` at `apps/web/src/stores/updatesStore.ts:293-307`.
- The web then queues downloads through `/api/packs/{pack}/download-asset` at `apps/web/src/stores/updatesStore.ts:315-321`.
- The plan says this was intentional because web downloads should use the Downloads tab, not `_sync_after_update()` at `plans/PLAN-Updates.md:886-921`.
- The `download-asset` endpoint downloads a blob and updates the lock at `src/store/api.py:2649-2715`.
- `download-asset` does not rebuild Profile views after updating the lock.
- `download-asset` creates a direct symlink into ComfyUI’s configured model folder at `src/store/api.py:2677-2707`.
- That direct symlink path is outside the Profiles view/attach system.
- This is a major integration inconsistency with the stated Profiles-as-app-connection model.
- Inventory has a Doctor action that posts `rebuild_views: true` to `/api/store/doctor` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/inventory/InventoryPage.tsx:409-415`.
- Doctor can rebuild active views at `src/store/__init__.py:986-1030`.
- Doctor also does not refresh already-attached UI roots after rebuilding views.
- Result: model updates can relink CLI Profile views when sync is used, but web update downloads do not automatically relink Profile views.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether another frontend polling effect calls Profile sync/doctor after update downloads complete. The audited update/download hooks only invalidate pack/backup queries at `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/hooks/usePackDownloads.ts:177-180`.

### Conflict handling

- Internal Profile view conflicts are resolved by destination path.
- `ViewPlan.add_entry()` detects duplicate `dst_relpath` at `src/store/view_builder.py:91-112`.
- Later profile packs replace earlier entries, so last pack wins.
- `ShadowedEntry` records winner and loser pack names at `src/store/view_builder.py:95-100`.
- `ProfileService.ensure_work_profile()` deliberately puts the used pack at the end so it wins conflicts at `src/store/profile_service.py:134-140`.
- `ConflictMode` includes `LAST_WINS`, `FIRST_WINS`, and `STRICT` at `src/store/models.py:68-72`.
- `Profile.conflicts` exists at `src/store/models.py:1017-1022`.
- `ViewBuilder` imports `ConflictMode` at `src/store/view_builder.py:29-38`.
- `ViewBuilder` does not actually branch on `profile.conflicts.mode`.
- Therefore `FIRST_WINS` and `STRICT` are modeled but not implemented in view planning.
- Conflict info is returned in `UseResult.shadowed` after `use()` builds views at `src/store/profile_service.py:240-246`.
- Store status currently returns an empty `shadowed` list and says accurate info would require computing a view plan at `src/store/__init__.py:951-960`.
- Profiles status reads shadowed entries from `store.status()` at `src/store/api.py:5039-5059`.
- Therefore `ProfilesPage` has a shadowed table, but it will normally show none unless `store.status()` is expanded.
- For UI installation conflicts:
  - A1111/Forge/SD.Next attach into a `synapse` subfolder, so root-level same filenames are not directly detected.
  - `UIAttacher.attach()` refuses to overwrite an existing real `synapse` path at `src/store/ui_attach.py:351-363`.
  - ComfyUI YAML exposes direct kind paths and has no filename conflict detection against existing ComfyUI roots at `src/store/ui_attach.py:121-140`.
  - `download-asset` can unlink an existing ComfyUI target path before making a symlink at `src/store/api.py:2702-2707`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: how ComfyUI resolves duplicate filenames across `extra_model_paths.yaml` and native model folders.

### UI in ProfilesPage

- `ProfilesPage` fetches `/api/profiles/status` every 5 seconds at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:40-49`.
- It shows one card per UI runtime status at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:140-217`.
- It shows active profile name per UI at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:153-161`.
- It shows Back and Reset only when active profile is not `global` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:164-184`.
- Back posts `{ ui_set: ui, sync: true }` to `/api/profiles/back` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:51-60`.
- Reset posts `{ ui_set: ui, sync: true }` to `/api/profiles/reset` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:71-80`.
- Singleton UI sets exist, so passing `ui_set: "comfyui"` works when `state/ui_sets.json` contains those singleton sets at `src/store/models.py:337-341`.
- It visualizes the per-UI stack at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:195-214`.
- It has a shadowed files table at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:226-260`.
- It has an updates badge area at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ProfilesPage.tsx:263-279`.
- It does not show app root paths.
- It does not show attach/detach status.
- It does not expose Attach, Detach, Sync, Doctor, or Connect actions.
- It does not show missing blobs, backup-only blobs, or restore progress.
- It does not let the user activate/use a pack.
- It does not let the user choose or edit UI sets.
- It does not show whether ComfyUI needs YAML restart/reload.
- It does not show whether a model is actually visible to the target UI.

### Backup integration

- `Store` constructs `BackupService` and injects it into `ProfileService` at `src/store/__init__.py:255-267`.
- `ProfileService._install_missing_blobs()` tries backup first when a blob is missing locally at `src/store/profile_service.py:493-539`.
- It checks backup connection at `src/store/profile_service.py:519-521`.
- It calls `restore_blob()` if the blob exists on backup at `src/store/profile_service.py:522-526`.
- It falls back to `blob_store.download()` from the first lock URL at `src/store/profile_service.py:530-535`.
- `use()` calls `_install_missing_blobs()` before building views at `src/store/profile_service.py:231-239`.
- `sync_profile()` calls `_install_missing_blobs()` when `install_missing=True` at `src/store/profile_service.py:386-397`.
- `back(sync=True)` does not call `_install_missing_blobs()` before rebuilding the previous profile at `src/store/profile_service.py:332-342`.
- Restore failures and download failures are swallowed at `src/store/profile_service.py:527-537`.
- The user gets only a note like `restored_N_blobs_from_backup` at `src/store/profile_service.py:235-239`.
- Inventory plan explicitly documents auto-restore on use as completed at `plans/PLAN-Model-Inventory.md:3401-3410`.
- Backup tests cover auto-restore on use at `tests/store/test_backup.py:643-680`.

## 2. SPECIFICATION GAPS

- No clear specification says whether UI installation discovery is required or manual path entry is sufficient.
- No clear specification says whether Profiles should auto-attach a UI after first successful `use`.
- No clear specification says when a user should run Attach versus Use versus Sync.
- No clear specification says whether default UI target should be `local`, `all`, or detected installed UIs.
- No clear specification resolves the two UI-set sources of truth:
  - store state `state/ui_sets.json`
  - app config `config.settings.StoreSettings.ui_sets`
- No clear specification resolves the two default UI-set sources:
  - `StoreConfig.defaults.ui_set`
  - `config.settings.StoreSettings.default_ui_set`
- No clear specification says whether Settings edits should mutate `state/config.json` and `state/ui_sets.json`.
- No clear specification says how Profiles should represent ComfyUI YAML state.
- No clear specification says whether ComfyUI attachment should require restart, reload, or no action.
- No clear specification defines conflict behavior when a Synapse-exposed filename matches a model already installed in a UI.
- No clear specification defines whether UI-native files should be shadowed, preserved, warned, hidden, or indexed.
- No clear specification says whether A1111/Forge/SD.Next should use `synapse/` subfolders or root-level exposure.
- No clear specification says whether `synapse/filename.safetensors` paths are acceptable for workflows and generation metadata.
- No clear specification says how SD.Next’s actual folder conventions differ from A1111/Forge.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: SD.Next may not be fully equivalent to A1111 path mapping.
- No clear specification says how Flux/SD3-era model kinds should map for each UI.
- No clear specification says how `CUSTOM_NODE` dependencies should connect to ComfyUI.
- No clear specification says whether workflow files are part of Profiles or separate pack artifacts.
- No clear specification says whether workflow symlinks should be governed by active profile.
- No clear specification says whether workflow symlinks should be created only for packs in the active profile.
- No clear specification says whether app connection should include UI health checks in ProfilesPage.
- No clear specification says whether auto-restore from backup should be silent or user-confirmed.
- No clear specification says whether backup restore must check available disk space before restoring during `use`.
- Inventory plan describes a confirmation dialog for restore, but code silently restores.
- No clear specification says whether `back(sync=True)` should auto-restore missing blobs for the previous profile.
- No clear specification says what happens if some target UIs sync successfully and others fail.
- No clear specification says whether `UseResult` should return attach refresh failures.
- No clear specification says whether `Store.use(sync=False)` should update runtime without ensuring the view exists.
- No clear specification says whether active UI symlinks should ever point to the stable `active` symlink instead of resolved profile paths.
- No clear specification says whether stale UI attach symlinks should be repaired by Doctor.
- No clear specification says whether orphaned Profile views should be cleaned automatically.
- No clear specification says how Profile deletion should affect built views and UI attachments.
- No clear specification says how strict conflict mode should surface in API/UI.
- No clear specification says whether multiple active profiles across UIs are supported UX or internal-only behavior.
- No clear specification says whether ProfilesPage should show per-UI missing blobs and unresolved dependencies.
- No clear specification says how Updates should trigger Profile view rebuilds in the web flow.
- No clear specification says whether `download-asset` should remain allowed to create direct ComfyUI symlinks.
- No clear specification says how Custom Pack creation should add packs to global/work profiles.
- No clear specification says whether imported workflow packs should auto-use, auto-sync, or only create pack state.
- No clear specification says what “connected” means for A1111/Forge/SD.Next beyond filesystem symlinks.
- No clear specification says whether external UI process APIs should be called to refresh model lists.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether any of the target UIs can detect symlink changes without restart/rescan.

## 3. IMPLEMENTATION HOLES

### Cross-cutting Profile holes

- `Profile.conflicts.mode` is modeled but ignored by `ViewBuilder`; all conflicts are last-wins.
- `StatusReport.shadowed` is always empty from `Store.status()` at `src/store/__init__.py:951-960`.
- `ProfilesPage` has a shadowed table that is currently starved by that empty status.
- `ProfilePackEntry.enabled` is shown in CLI at `src/store/cli.py:524-528`, but `ViewBuilder.compute_plan()` does not check `pack_entry.enabled` at `src/store/view_builder.py:236-270`.
- `ProfileService._load_packs_for_profile()` swallows all pack load errors at `src/store/profile_service.py:483-490`.
- `ProfileService._install_missing_blobs()` swallows restore/download errors at `src/store/profile_service.py:522-537`.
- `UseResult` does not include build report errors, missing blob counts, or attach refresh results.
- `sync_profile()` returns build reports but Store/API reduce them to counts and errors only at `src/store/api.py:5098-5119`.
- `Store.sync()` does not refresh already-attached UIs after rebuilding views.
- `Store.reset(sync=True)` calls `sync()` but does not refresh already-attached UIs.
- `UpdateService._sync_after_update()` rebuilds views but does not refresh already-attached UIs.
- `ViewBuilder.clean_orphaned_views()` exists but is not wired into store operations.
- `delete_pack()` removes work profiles and runtime references but does not clean built view folders.
- `use(sync=False)` pushes runtime stack without building or activating a view.
- `back(sync=False)` tries activation and suppresses any failure at `src/store/profile_service.py:343-349`.

### ComfyUI holes

- ComfyUI path detection is only `Path.exists()` against `config.comfyui.base_path` at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:89-91`.
- ComfyUI attach via YAML only includes kinds with existing view folders at `src/store/ui_attach.py:123-136`.
- ComfyUI YAML does not include `base_path`; it writes absolute paths per kind at `src/store/ui_attach.py:138-140`.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether this YAML shape is accepted by all supported ComfyUI versions.
- ComfyUI custom nodes are not attached through Profiles.
- ComfyUI workflows are managed through separate ComfyUI-specific endpoints, not Profiles.
- Direct `download-asset` symlinks into ComfyUI bypass Profiles at `src/store/api.py:2677-2707`.
- Direct `download-asset` can remove an existing ComfyUI file/symlink at `src/store/api.py:2702-2707`.
- ComfyUI attach status does not validate whether YAML paths still point to the current active profile contents.
- ComfyUI attach status only checks whether `synapse` exists in YAML at `src/store/ui_attach.py:499-508`.

### Forge holes

- Forge folder maps exist at `src/store/models.py:160-171`.
- Forge installation detection is only configured-root existence via `UIAttacher.status()`.
- Forge attachment uses `models/<kind>/synapse` symlinks at `src/store/ui_attach.py:345-367`.
- Existing root-level Forge model filename conflicts are not detected.
- Existing non-symlink `synapse` folders are reported as errors, but no migration path exists.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether Forge sees models inside `models/Lora/synapse` with expected names in all workflows.

### A1111 holes

- A1111 folder maps exist at `src/store/models.py:172-183`.
- A1111 is not part of default `local` UI set at `src/store/models.py:331-336`.
- A1111 installation detection is only configured-root existence.
- Existing A1111 root-level model filename conflicts are not detected.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether A1111 model scanning behaves correctly with nested `synapse` subfolders for every mapped kind.

### SD.Next holes

- SD.Next folder maps exist at `src/store/models.py:184-195`.
- SD.Next is not part of default `local` UI set at `src/store/models.py:331-336`.
- SD.Next installation detection is only configured-root existence.
- SD.Next mapping duplicates A1111/Forge mapping.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether SD.Next actually uses all listed A1111-compatible paths.
- Existing SD.Next root-level model filename conflicts are not detected.

### Settings/config holes

- Settings saves `store_ui_roots` to app config at `apps/web/src/components/modules/SettingsPage.tsx:168-177`.
- Backend writes those roots to `config.settings` at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:247-253`.
- Store UI targets still come from `state/ui_sets.json` at `src/store/__init__.py:307-321`.
- Settings default UI-set changes do not obviously mutate `state/config.json` defaults.
- Settings UI sets do not obviously mutate `state/ui_sets.json`.
- `UIAttacher` is cached in `Store._get_ui_attacher()` at `src/store/__init__.py:1053-1087`.
- Store singleton is reset when UI roots change at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:263-265`.
- Store singleton is not reset when only `store_default_ui_set` or `store_ui_sets` change at `apps/api/src/routers/system.py:255-259`.
- Because store target resolution uses state files, this may not matter for targets, but it confirms the source-of-truth split.

### API/CLI holes

- API has store-level attach/detach/status endpoints at `src/store/api.py:446-478`.
- Profiles API does not expose attach/detach/status.
- Profiles API `reset` returns legacy `ui_results` but drops `ResetResult.notes` at `src/store/api.py:5122-5151`.
- CLI exposes `use`, `back`, `reset`, `profiles list`, `profiles show`, `status`, `attach`, `detach`, `attach-status`, `sync` at `src/store/cli.py:390-685` and `src/store/cli.py:965-985`.
- CLI `sync` appears to call `store.sync(profile_name=profile, ui_set=ui_set)` even when `profile` is `None` at `src/store/cli.py:965-974`; `Store.sync()` requires a string profile name.
- CLI `update` output treats `result.applied` as iterable length at `src/store/cli.py:813-818`; `UpdateResult.applied` is a bool at `src/store/models.py:1195-1205`.
- These CLI issues are adjacent but affect end-to-end Profile operations.

### Custom Pack holes

- Custom pack API creates a pack at `src/store/api.py:3275-3345`.
- It does not add the new pack to global profile.
- It does not sync any Profile views.
- It does not attach or refresh any UI.
- It calls `store.layout.pack_path()` at `src/store/api.py:3334`.
- `StoreLayout` defines `pack_dir()`, not `pack_path()`, in audited code at `src/store/layout.py:169-179`.
- That suggests custom pack creation may currently fail unless `pack_path` is provided elsewhere. NEEDS VERIFICATION.

### Workflow holes

- Workflows are stored under pack workflows paths at `src/store/layout.py:189-191`.
- Pack detail builds workflow symlink status against ComfyUI paths only at `src/store/api.py:1763-1837`.
- Workflow symlink creation writes into ComfyUI user workflow folder at `src/store/api.py:4568-4621`.
- Workflow UI labels this as ComfyUI workflow management at `apps/web/src/components/modules/pack-detail/sections/PackWorkflowsSection.tsx:1-15`.
- Workflow links are not scoped to active Profile.
- Workflow links are not managed by `ViewBuilder`.
- Workflow links are not available for A1111/Forge/SD.Next.
- Workflow delete removes ComfyUI symlink variants at `src/store/api.py:4725-4737`.

## 4. INTEGRATION GAPS

### Profiles vs Updates

- CLI update can rebuild Profile views through `_sync_after_update()`.
- Web update intentionally does not call update sync.
- Web update queues downloads through `download-asset`.
- `download-asset` updates lock state but does not rebuild Profile views.
- `download-asset` creates direct ComfyUI symlinks outside Profiles.
- Therefore a web-updated model can exist in blob store and ComfyUI direct symlink but not in Profile views until Doctor/Sync runs.
- `ProfilesPage` update badge depends on `_cached_updates_count` at `src/store/api.py:5052-5059`.
- I did not find `_cached_updates_count` set in the update store flow except API-side search result at `src/store/api.py:5240` from grep context. NEEDS VERIFICATION.
- Update impact plans mention impacted packs, but Profile stacks do not surface impacted active profiles.
- Update sync does not refresh UI attachment paths.
- If UI symlinks point to resolved active profile dirs, a rebuilt active profile may require refresh.

### Profiles vs Inventory

- Inventory plan models `active_in_uis` at `plans/PLAN-Model-Inventory.md:280-296`.
- Profiles runtime has active profile per UI at `src/store/models.py:1058-1103`.
- Store status can detect missing blobs for active profile at `src/store/__init__.py:913-947`.
- Inventory Quick Action can run Doctor rebuild views at `apps/web/src/components/modules/inventory/InventoryPage.tsx:409-415`.
- Doctor rebuilds views but does not refresh attached UI roots.
- Inventory backup-only restore integrates into `use()` and `sync_profile()`.
- Inventory UI is likely where backup restore is visible, but ProfilesPage does not expose backup-only state.
- Diagnostics TODO in inventory plan says Settings diagnostics should move to Profiles and validate all UI paths at `plans/PLAN-Model-Inventory.md:3998-4015`.
- That has not happened in `ProfilesPage`.

### Profiles vs Custom Pack

- Custom pack creation creates pack metadata only.
- It does not add to global profile.
- It does not create or update a work profile.
- It does not call Profile sync.
- It does not provide a “use this pack now” flow.
- It may call a nonexistent `StoreLayout.pack_path()` method. NEEDS VERIFICATION.
- If custom packs contain local-file dependencies, Profile view exposure depends on lock resolution and blob adoption, not custom pack creation itself.
- There is no ProfilesPage action to add/remove custom packs from global profile.
- There is no ProfilesPage indication that a custom pack exists but is not in any active profile.

### Profiles vs Workflow Wizard

- Workflow import in `ImportModal` posts workflow JSON to `/api/packs/import` at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ImportModal.tsx:61-83`.
- Workflow import invalidates packs only at `apps/web/src/components/modules/ImportModal.tsx:84-92`.
- It does not call `use`, `sync`, `attach`, or workflow symlink creation.
- Workflow symlink management is per-pack and ComfyUI-only.
- Workflows are not activated/deactivated with Profile stack changes.
- If a user switches Profiles, existing ComfyUI workflow symlinks remain until manually removed.
- Workflow dependencies may be in packs, but workflow file exposure is separate from model view exposure.
- There is no “active Profile workflows” concept in code.
- NEEDS VERIFICATION: whether workflow-scanned packs are automatically added to global profile by the import endpoint.

### Real-world flows not tested

- No test covers installed-UI discovery because no discovery exists.
- No test covers Settings UI roots saving through `/api/system/settings` and then attaching with those roots.
- No test covers divergence between app config UI sets and store `state/ui_sets.json`.
- No test covers Profile sync followed by UI attachment refresh.
- No test covers `Store.sync()` with already-attached ComfyUI/Forge roots.
- No test covers `Store.reset(sync=True)` refreshing UI attachment.
- No test covers update web flow: apply lock, queue download, complete download, rebuild Profile view.
- No test covers `download-asset` conflicting with the Profiles connection model.
- No test covers `download-asset` unlinking an existing real ComfyUI model file.
- No test covers ComfyUI YAML duplicate filename behavior.
- No test covers A1111 existing model conflict behavior.
- No test covers Forge existing model conflict behavior.
- No test covers SD.Next existing model conflict behavior.
- No test covers strict or first-wins conflict mode.
- No test covers disabled `ProfilePackEntry.enabled`.
- No test covers orphaned Profile view cleanup.
- No test covers deleting a pack and then cleaning `data/views/<ui>/profiles/work__Pack`.
- No test covers custom-node Profile exposure.
- No test covers workflow symlinks being scoped to active profile.
- No test covers back/sync auto-restore from backup.
- No test covers partial UI failure during multi-UI `use`.
- No test covers Windows symlink fallback behavior.
- No test covers filesystem permission failures for ComfyUI YAML patching.
- No test covers invalid YAML in existing `extra_model_paths.yaml`.
- No test covers UIAttacher status detecting stale paths after active profile changes.
- No test covers ProfilesPage user flow from disconnected UI to connected UI.
- No test covers full flow: install ComfyUI -> configure path -> attach -> use pack -> model appears.
- No Playwright/browser test appears to validate ProfilesPage UX or Settings app-path UX.

## 6. UX HOLES

- A user can configure UI paths in Settings, but ProfilesPage does not show those paths.
- A user can see active profile stacks, but not whether any UI is attached.
- A user can click Back/Reset, but cannot click Attach/Detach from ProfilesPage.
- A user cannot tell from ProfilesPage whether ComfyUI, Forge, A1111, or SD.Next is installed.
- Settings diagnostics only directly validates ComfyUI.
- Forge/A1111/SD.Next path errors are not first-class in Settings diagnostics.
- A user cannot tell whether the default UI set includes their target UI.
- A user may set A1111 path but default `local` only targets ComfyUI and Forge.
- Settings default UI set may not affect store runtime target resolution because store uses `state/ui_sets.json`.
- A user may not understand that “use pack” and “attach UI” are separate operations.
- A user may import/download a pack and expect it to appear in ComfyUI immediately.
- If the UI is not attached, `use()` builds Synapse views but does not connect the UI.
- If the UI is attached but stale, some operations rebuild views without refresh.
- A user has no direct “Connect this UI” path from ProfilesPage.
- A user has no “test model visibility” confirmation.
- A user has no “open this target folder” or “copy current active view path” affordance.
- A user has no visibility into `extra_model_paths.yaml` patch status from ProfilesPage.
- A user has no prompt to restart/rescan target UI after attach.
- A user has no warning that A1111/Forge/SD.Next models are exposed under a `synapse` subfolder.
- A user has no UI-native conflict warning.
- A user has no warning if ComfyUI already has a model with the same filename.
- A user has no warning that web updates may need view rebuild/doctor to reflect Profile views.
- A user has no ProfilesPage restore progress when backup-only blobs are auto-restored.
- Silent backup restore may look like `use()` is hanging for large files.
- Failure to restore or download missing blobs can be swallowed, leaving only missing view entries.
- ProfilesPage does not show missing blob count.
- ProfilesPage does not show build errors.
- ProfilesPage does not show unresolved dependencies.
- ProfilesPage does not show attached app health.
- ProfilesPage does not show “last synced” or “view built” state.
- ProfilesPage does not show stale orphaned views.
- Custom packs can be created without obvious “add to active Profile” next step.
- Workflow imports can create packs/workflows without obvious “activate dependencies in Profile” next step.
- Workflow symlink controls live in pack detail, not Profiles, so workflow app connection is split from model app connection.
- The phrase “Profiles” in UI currently means stack management more than end-to-end app connection.

## 7. OPEN QUESTIONS

- Should ProfilesPage become the canonical UI connection dashboard?
- Should Attach/Detach/Attach Status move from store-level UI into ProfilesPage?
- Should `/api/profiles/status` include attach status for every UI?
- Should `/api/profiles/status` include configured root path and existence for every UI?
- Should UI installation detection remain path-exists only, or should Synapse scan common locations?
- Should default UI targets be configured in store state, app config, or one unified source?
- Should Settings write `state/config.json` and `state/ui_sets.json` for Profile defaults?
- Should `local` default include A1111 and SD.Next when their roots exist?
- Should `use(pack)` auto-attach a UI if the UI is configured but detached?
- Should `use(pack)` fail, warn, or continue when no target UI is attached?
- Should `sync(profile)` refresh attached UIs automatically?
- Should `reset(sync=True)` refresh attached UIs automatically?
- Should update downloads trigger Profile view rebuild after completion?
- Should `download-asset` stop creating direct ComfyUI symlinks?
- Should all app connection go through Profile views only?
- Should ComfyUI use absolute per-kind YAML paths or a `base_path` style YAML?
- Should A1111/Forge/SD.Next symlinks point to the stable `views/<ui>/active/...` path instead of resolved profile dirs?
- Should `UIAttacher` ever overwrite existing `synapse` real directories?
- What should happen when a UI already has a model with the same filename?
- Should Profile conflict mode support `first_wins` and `strict`, or should the model be simplified to last-wins only?
- Should `ProfilePackEntry.enabled` affect view building?
- Should custom nodes be managed by Profiles?
- Should workflows be scoped by active Profile?
- Should workflow symlinks be removed when a pack leaves the active Profile?
- Should non-Comfy workflow targets exist for A1111/Forge/SD.Next, or are workflows ComfyUI-only?
- Should backup auto-restore during `use` be silent or confirmed by the user?
- Should backup restore check disk space before copying?
- Should `back(sync=True)` restore missing blobs for the target profile?
- Should build errors and missing blobs be hard failures for `use`, or warnings?
- Should `UseResult` expose per-UI build and attach-refresh results?
- Should Doctor clean orphaned Profile views by default?
- Should deleting a pack remove its built view directories?
- Should ProfilesPage show a “model should now appear in ComfyUI as X” confirmation?
- Should Profile status compute shadowed entries live, cache them, or persist build reports?
- Should SD.Next mapping be separately verified and adjusted instead of sharing A1111 paths?
- Should Forge mapping be separately verified for all current asset kinds?
- Should Windows copy fallback be allowed, given it breaks content-addressed live-link semantics?
- Should app connection support an explicit “rescan UI models” command per UI where available?
